entries.name: Hot Dogs, Horseshoes & Hand Grenades
entries.shortDescription: Do you like hot dogs? How about horseshoes? Hand grenades? (everyone likes hand grenades) Anyway, we've got all that, and guns. SO MANY GUNS. So if you like ordnance, meat, and far too many groan-worthy puns, this is the VR sandbox game for you.

entries.name: Palworld
entries.shortDescription: Fight, farm, build and work alongside mysterious creatures called "Pals" in this completely new multiplayer, open world survival and crafting game!

entries.name: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
entries.shortDescription: Gloria Victis is an MMORPG with an emphasis on realism, set in a low-fantasy medieval open world. Enjoy MMO with skill-based non-target combat, open PVP with territory control, deep crafting system and player-driven economy – all that served with beautiful graphics and an immersive atmosphere.

entries.name: Angels Fall First
entries.shortDescription: From commanding the battle standing on the bridge of your flagship all the way down to tactical infantry firefights - AFF brings together all the combat you ever loved in a rich science fiction setting. Boarding, pilotable capital ships, deep weapon customization and full Bot support included!

entries.name: Blood Gauntlet
entries.shortDescription: Blood Gauntlet is a fast-paced, pixel art action platformer where you’re constantly bleeding out. The only way to survive is to keep moving and destroy everything in your path!

entries.name: MECCHA CHAMELEON
entries.shortDescription: Paint yourself to blend in! "Meccha Chameleon" is a new-sensation hide-and-seek game where you paint your white body to mimic the stage. Spot, pose, and "artistic skill" are keys to survival. Deceive Seekers with techniques that put chameleons to shame! Supports public matches and streaming.

entries.name: Zenless Zone Zero
entries.shortDescription: Zenless Zone Zero is HoYoverse’s brand-new urban fantasy ARPG. Players act as "Proxies" who explore Hollows alongside a wide range of unique Agents, fighting enemies, and completing commissions on their journey to unveil the mysteries behind New Eridu.

entries.name: Tri City Monsters
entries.shortDescription: Tri City Monsters is a supernatural, monsterlovin' visual novel where you can romance and/or de-pants 3 demonic love interests. Navigate a dangerous urban jungle with their help and maybe you'll get a taste of what it means to be a monster.

entries.name: Plant Nursery Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Run your own cozy Plant Nursery in this relaxing sim. Grow crops, stock shelves, and help customers. Expand with greenhouses, hire staff, and decorate your dream shop. Perfect for fans of wholesome farming and sim games.

entries.name: Prologue: Go Wayback!
entries.shortDescription: Prologue: Go Wayback! is a single-player open-world emergent survival roguelike where every journey is unique. Traverse a new wilderness that is generated for you every time you play. Chart your path, overcome the elements, and write your own story of exploration.

entries.name: Esports Manager 2026
entries.shortDescription: Build and lead your own professional esports organization. Scout players, manage contracts, develop talent, hire staff, grow your brand, and compete for championship titles in a deep and realistic management simulation.

entries.name: Skillwood
entries.shortDescription: Skillwood is a relaxing woodcutter simulator inspired by survival simulators and incremental games. Chop wood, mine stone, trade with NPCs, upgrade forests, unlock new trees or new areas and prestige to do even better next run.

entries.name: SWAPMEAT
entries.shortDescription: Rip through hostile alien worlds, harvest mutant body parts mid-combat, and adapt faster than your enemies. Every alien you harvest gives you new body parts with unique powers, like triple-jump legs, turret-dropping torsos, grenade-launching turkey heads. Steal, swap, survive.

entries.name: Pornographer
entries.shortDescription: Pornographer is, first and foremost, an interactive FILM. A film where you can influence what happens on screen. The dark and absurd humor will definitely leave no one indifferent.

entries.name: Game Compressor
entries.shortDescription: Free up space without deleting games! Game Compressor uses Windows LZX to reduce game sizes by up to 50%. Preview estimated savings, choose the most efficient games, play without extracting archives, and undo compression anytime.

entries.name: Burger Bots Inc.
entries.shortDescription: An online co-op burger flipping game with scary and strange customers that you shouldn't anger.

entries.name: Goblin Camp
entries.shortDescription: Build a new home for your goblins! Grow your settlement from a little encampment to a bustling city in a beautiful procedurally generated northern forest. Fish, farm, explore the forest and harness the spirits in a unique fantasy citybuilder inspired by Finnish mythology.

entries.name: 十米爆爽超变
entries.shortDescription: 无首充！无套路! 无强制消费! 耐玩性佳：海量特色玩法持续更新，长久陪伴乐趣无穷！ 匠心巨制：团队潜心一年重磅打造，热血体验诚意奉上！ 人气保障：专注打造火爆大服，激情永不落幕！

entries.name: Sineus Arena Survivors
entries.shortDescription: Fight hordes and defend your Stronghold in a bullet heaven survivor-like with co-op and tower defense. Gain power-ups every level, collect random artifacts from chests and grow stronger to survive, defeat the boss and claim a top spot on the Sineus Arena leaderboards!

entries.name: S.A.N.D.Y. - Beach Cleaner
entries.shortDescription: Clean up trash from the beach in this short, relaxing, and grim game! Recycle waste, upgrade your robot. Explore new territories. Clean up oil spills and save the animals!

entries.name: Battle For Embolia
entries.shortDescription: Battle For Embolia is a fast-paced indie MMORPG with responsive combat, meaningful progression, and constant updates. Explore a growing world, face challenging bosses, and help shape the game’s development through community feedback. Free to play with no pay-to-win.

entries.name: Icaria
entries.shortDescription: Icaria is a robot colony builder where everything can be programmed. Build factories, design logistic networks, terraform the landscape, and explore an unknown alien world.

entries.name: NTE: Neverness to Everness
entries.shortDescription: NTE is a supernatural urban open-world RPG developed by Hotta Studio. Your story begins in Hethereau as an unlicensed anomaly hunter. Team up with a diverse cast of companions, each with unique abilities, to unravel the city's mysteries.

entries.name: Peach Hills Division
entries.shortDescription: An erotic point-and-click adventure game blending paranormal fantasy with military intrigue. Woo your squadmates, collect clues, and uncover the secrets of the Peach Hills Division!

entries.name: MEGABOOBS 🔞
entries.shortDescription: A fully NSFW 3D survivor roguelite packed with massive, hyper-proportioned heroines, intense action, and uncensored adult content. Stack powerful builds, survive endless hordes, and unlock highly explicit hentai scenes as you push deeper into the run.

entries.name: Treasure Beach
entries.shortDescription: Scavenge the beach and run a cozy trinket shop by the sea! Find hidden treasures or trash, clean and repair your finds, put them up for sale, and upgrade your workshop. Dig deeper and faster to make more money and buy back the beach from the greedy hotel.

entries.name: Gastova: The Witches of Arkana
entries.shortDescription: Gastova is a lighthearted 2D platform adventure game. As the Guardian Witch of Arkana, Gastova must keep the balance of magic, solve a mystery involving the elemental fount guardians, discover hidden truths, and protect the future of her world from ominous forces before it's too late...

entries.name: The Message from Deep Space
entries.shortDescription: Mission: Translate an interstellar message, using the universal languages of math & science.

entries.name: COPA CITY
entries.shortDescription: An economic strategy where top football clubs entrust you with organizing their matches. Build in the city, manage its structures and stadium, provide entertainment, food, and security for fans. Your success is measured by Match Readiness.

entries.name: Furry Aim Trainer 2 : Multiplayer Gooning
entries.shortDescription: Furry Aim Trainer 2 arrives with more advanced training and MULTIPLAYER support! With a MASSIVE selection of Furry targets and so many weapons to train on, you can enhance your skills and your pleasure at the same time!

entries.name: Gods and Kings
entries.shortDescription: A game that combines real-time strategy, card collection and role-playing. It's based on Greek mythology. You can play as heroes who can manipulate the power of Rune, summon the army and cast magic to defeat enemies, challenge or defend the authority of the Gods.

entries.name: Idle Startup
entries.shortDescription: Build a tech company from a one-person garage into a global empire. Train six skills, complete their upgrade trees, chase milestone bonuses, and unlock new departments in this clean, addictive incremental idle game — progress keeps rolling even while you're away.

entries.name: Ocean Rush
entries.shortDescription: Ocean Rush is a fast-paced ocean escape adventure where every second counts!

entries.name: Melon Clicker
entries.shortDescription: Click the melon to accumulate points. Ideal for short breaks or unwinding.

entries.name: Rhythmic Retro Racer
entries.shortDescription: Rhythmic Retro Racer is a music-first rhythm game set in a mysterious 90s retro room. Hit precisely crafted rhythms built with professional tools and lose yourself in a powerful synthwave soundtrack. As the tension grows, you realize you are not playing a game, you are part of an experiment.

entries.name: Dynasty Protocol
entries.shortDescription: Command your space fleet, mine asteroids, and conquer colonies in this immersive real-time strategy game. Build powerful space stations, upgrade your ships through combat experience, and manage vital resources as you expand your dynasty across a star system.

entries.name: Sauve le Shérif !
entries.shortDescription: Sauve le Shérif 4 à 10 joueurs. Deux saloons. Une seule règle : ne fais confiance à personne. Chat vocal en proximité, duels en face-à-face, et un dilemme à chaque tir : pacifier ou abattre.

entries.name: Flawed Tactics
entries.shortDescription: The autobattler where the market IS the balance patch. Build your team, cast your spells, create powerful relics, optimize synergies - but watch the ticker. Every minion you buy raises its price for every player. No permanent metas. No overpowered favorites. Just tactics, and flawed ones at that

entries.name: Null Hørizøn
entries.shortDescription: Survive the void in Null Hørizøn. Trade, fight, and explore a retro-futuristic 3D galaxy with 2D sprites. Upgrade your ship, smuggle goods, and travel across the universe. Tactical Real-Time combat meets Grid-based exploration in this atmospheric space sim. The Null Hørizøn calls, Captain.

entries.name: Market Simulator: Miami Beach
entries.shortDescription: Build your supermarket empire in Miami Beach! Start in a tent, drive to pick up wholesale cargo, and physically stock shelves. Survive the street economy, use your family to gather extra cash, and expand to two stores in this realistic business management and life sim.

entries.name: Rental Store Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Run a store in the nostalgic world of video rentals. Manage inventory, serve customers, and customize your store to create the ultimate rental store experience. Purchase a range of movies and consoles. Hire and train employees. Upgrade and design your store.

entries.name: Karting4Fun
entries.shortDescription: Jump into a race full of adrenaline, sharp turns, and wild contact. Bumping and shoving opponents is not only allowed—it’s encouraged!

entries.name: Syndeo-Complex
entries.shortDescription: In Syndeo-Complex you will explore five different environments connected by a hub. Each level has its own mechanics, weapons, enemies and bosses. The Keli, small droids, will (probably) guide you in your quest.

entries.name: Cube Kingdoms
entries.shortDescription: Build a medieval settlement in a fantasy world, manage economy and defense, and fight battles against goblins, undead, demons, and epic boss monsters in auto‑battle style.

entries.name: Supre-Immune
entries.shortDescription: Join a roguelike action where cute immune cells battle viruses. Collect data in fast-paced combat, gain weapons and abilities through evolution, or level up to grow stronger. The fun of building your own super immune cell with different combinations each run is up to you!

entries.name: XO-Planets
entries.shortDescription: An old-school, frantic roguelike action platformer with tower defense gameplay and light RPG elements.

entries.name: Cosmodrill
entries.shortDescription: Explore the vastness of space, dig deep into planets to find resources, upgrade your ship and survive against alien life in this short space mining adventure! How far are you willing to travel into the dark unknown?

entries.name: Tales Of Wakana
entries.shortDescription: "Tales of Wakana" is a fairy-tale action-adventure game full of fantasy and challenges. Step into a vast, mysterious continent, use magic to battle diverse monsters, and enjoy a unique soulful journey exploring the meaning of life, family bonds, and self-discovery.

entries.name: Hell Runner
entries.shortDescription: A precision speedrun platformer built for mastery. Learn brutal routes, unlock movement abilities, and replay handcrafted levels until every second is yours.

entries.name: Corgi Survivor
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced dog-lite survival game! Survive relentless waves of insects and wild animals charging at you. Simple controls meet high-speed action in this intense dog-lite experience.

entries.name: Grid Tactics: Duel
entries.shortDescription: Grid Tactics: Duel is a competitive card game built on an 8×8 grid. Every move is about positioning, timing, and resource trade-offs. With limited resources, choose when and where to play—set up or apply pressure. Each placement reshapes the board. Win through deckbuilding and precise execution.

entries.name: Neon Pulsefire
entries.shortDescription: Create an endless variety of unique builds and decimate huge waves of enemies. Unlock unique classes, weapons, passives and stats to unlock even more overpowered builds as you weave your way through enemies, arena hazards and projectile assaults.

entries.name: SEX CLUB
entries.shortDescription: SEX CLUB - is a simple 2D game for adults in which you have to uncover hot images of beautiful ladies.

entries.name: INSANIO
entries.shortDescription: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

entries.name: Astaryn: RPG Idler
entries.shortDescription: A World of Warcraft inspired game, with RPG features and an offline progression. Choose a hero and start farming, fight monsters, level up your skills, complete all the quests, run dungeons and get the best gear while joining player Clans and fighting in the PvP Arena!

entries.name: Maseylia : Echoes of the Past
entries.shortDescription: Explore a fully interconnected 3D world where every new ability dramatically expands your freedom. A true non-linear Metroidvania with breathtaking movement, atmospheric sci-fi beauty, and deep environmental storytelling.

entries.name: Moon River
entries.shortDescription: Moon River is a short RPG adventure with an emphasis on music and atmosphere. Perhaps some secrets too... Explore the remains of an quiet, empty world & find the river's end.

entries.name: TEAM PANIC
entries.shortDescription: TEAM PANIC is a cinematic psychological horror experience with a story, where two players try to escape deadly creatures, solve puzzles, and uncover the truth behind a mysterious experiment.

entries.name: REWIND
entries.shortDescription: 《REWIND》 is a hardcore text-based detective puzzle game containing nearly a hundred clues. Players need to carefully examine and deduce the clues to find the answer to the case.

entries.name: 101 Dogs Hidden in Vienna
entries.shortDescription: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 dogs in Vienna 🐾 in the hand-crafted landscape. 🏆 Earn tons of achievements. How many 🐶 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

entries.name: Giant Horse Feeding
entries.shortDescription: Giant Horse Feeding is a silly alien colony simulator where you feed a horse & collect its droppings to build an alien empire. Automate production, unlock bizarre technologies, and create an endless recycling loop where horse droppings become the foundation of your civilization.

entries.name: MAGE: Mega Awesome Gregarious Encounters
entries.shortDescription: An action-packed 2D projectile fighter inspired by controller couch party classics. Master one of 21 unique Mages across over 200 maps in a simple but customizable and deep experience for up to 4 players local or online.

entries.name: Tech Store & Repair Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Build the ultimate tech store empire! Buy wholesale electronics, stock shelves, and sell the latest smartphones. Master hardware repairs for extra cash. Manage your hunger in a life sim open world, hire staff, and expand your retail tycoon business.

entries.name: Lumina Veil
entries.shortDescription: Lumina Veil, a horror game with a modern twist! Step into the shoes of a popular streamer on a journey into a strange new game. As you dive deeper, you'll find yourself escaping the isolation of your own world, only to discover that the lines between fantasy and reality are beginning to blur.

entries.name: FRCTL
entries.shortDescription: FRCTL is a fast-paced arcade shooter roguelike. Its got combos and other cool stuff like complex enemies. Good time waster! also its FREEE!!!!!

entries.name: Timber!
entries.shortDescription: Dementia, tragedy and fun – all in the same taste of a potato! Timber! is a 2D point-and-click storydriven game that takes you on an emotional journey. Explore a mix of feelings, from the heart-wrenching struggles of dementia to the unraveling of a tragic story.

entries.name: 101 Dogs Hidden in New York
entries.shortDescription: Join this adventure and discover the hiding places of 101 dogs in New York 🐾 in the hand-crafted landscape. 🏆 Earn tons of achievements. How many 🐶 can you find? 🔎 Be quick! ⏱️

entries.name: For the Crown
entries.shortDescription: A puzzle logistics builder where lemming-like workers transport resources across a limited island. Create production chains, optimize routes, upgrade your castle and solve increasingly complex space and logistics challenges. The island never gets bigger. Your logistics problems do.

entries.name: CyberpunkXXX
entries.shortDescription: CyberpunkXXX is a third person adult action adventure set in a dystopian cyberpunk style world. You play as a Bounty Droid hired by an underground rebel force to help overthrow the ruling dictatorship. Use weapons, vehicles and melee combat to achieve your objectives.

entries.name: Tales Beyond The Tomb - No Witnesses
entries.shortDescription: A psychological horror anthology inspired by disturbing real-life cases. In No Witnesses, a simple road trip turns into a brutal fight for survival when two sisters cross paths with a ruthless serial killer stalking the highways at night.

entries.name: Remagotchi
entries.shortDescription: Retro virtual pet game with total fidelity to the 90s classics. A pixel art simulator with multiple characters, including rare pets, where your choices shape the evolution of your virtual pet.

entries.name: Dropper Factory
entries.shortDescription: First-person 3D clicker about developing a cube factory: start generators, upgrade production, increase cube value, and automate your progress.

entries.name: Summer Sisters
entries.shortDescription: It's been years since Yuu last visited the countryside, and this summer, he'll finally be reunited with the sisters Hana, Rina, and Hina! Unfortunately, his mom has to hurry home, so he'll be staying with the three of them for a while. Find out what fun awaits him in Japanese countryside!

entries.name: HAELE 3D - Portrait Studio Lite - Drawing References
entries.shortDescription: HAELE 3D - Portrait Studio Lite is a facial anatomy drawing reference tool designed for beginners to advanced artists. It includes a variety of realistic and simplified characters, expressions, and editable lighting. It is easy to use and made to complement tutorials. It helps artists practice and improve their face drawing skills.

entries.name: Obstacles: Gems of Power
entries.shortDescription: Slide between obstacles to collect gems and collect points in this bullet time arcade game! In Obstacles you're encouraged to take your time and plan your action to dodge obstacles which only move when you move.

entries.name: The Abyss Below
entries.shortDescription: The year is 1997. Pilot a small submersible into the depths of the Pacific to investigate a massive sonar anomaly. Navigate by instruments, scan targets, and uncover something far older than it should be.

entries.name: FINIS ACTUS
entries.shortDescription: 1891 London. In the mansion of a famous illusionist, the connection between reality and madness is severed. Many who trusted their intellect have been lost in these corridors. Before the curtain falls, will you see beyond the illusion, or will you become part of this tragedy?

entries.name: Enduro Unleashed
entries.shortDescription: Jump on your motocross bike or quad and go wild on vast maps full of climbs, descents, jumps and tracks created by the community.

entries.name: Godius Eternal War
entries.shortDescription: A classic 2D pixel MMORPG inspired by the golden age of online RPGs. Join nation wars, explore an open multiplayer world, trade with players, battle in PvP, and experience a community-driven adventure that has continued since 1999.

entries.name: FULL METAL COFFIN
entries.shortDescription: FULL METAL COFFIN is a 3D co-op submarine simulator. Crew your vessel with up to 4 players. Load the torpedoes, dodge incoming fire, and eliminate the enemy.

entries.name: STARVAULT
entries.shortDescription: Starvault is the first true VR MOBA shooter, blending classic MOBA strategy with explosive hero-shooter action. Squad up, master unique heroes, unlock insane skins, and jump into intense 5v5 battles. Step into the arena!

entries.name: 贝如塔按摩店模拟器 Beta Massage Parlor Simulator
entries.shortDescription: 建造并经营你的按摩店，雇佣伊莲、阴婷、贝塔柔、肌肉男等员工为你工作，自定义装饰你的按摩店，打造出属于你的独特按摩店吧！

entries.name: Spirit of the Dome
entries.shortDescription: Defend against endless waves of enemies and dark forces across a decaying world in this RTS styled tower defense game!

entries.name: NTR Idol: Déjà Vu
entries.shortDescription: Become Eri's manager and lead the newcomer through her special training and the dark underbelly of the idol industry. Her boyfriend Harry can only watch as she blossoms from a innocent girl into an experienced idol.

entries.name: Tokyo Valkyries
entries.shortDescription: Build the Deck That Saves Tokyo! Tokyo Valkyries is a roguelite deckbuilder where players craft a deck and strategize to defeat the enemies that stand in their way and progress through the map. Construct your deck and wield it to defend Tokyo from the Underworld invasion!

entries.name: Train45
entries.shortDescription: You and several other women are trapped aboard an endless train by the demon Konial. Uncover the train’s eerie anomalies before death comes for you!

entries.name: Unquiet Grey
entries.shortDescription: You can't save him... but what if you could meet him again? Unquiet Grey is a heartbreaking timeloop visual novel about a troubled young woman and the kind-hearted musician she loves through countless lifetimes.

entries.name: This Game is Simple
entries.shortDescription: Wander through an ever-changing level in This Game is Simple- a quiet, meditative story about a game developer losing passion towards their work.

entries.name: Stick Scholars
entries.shortDescription: A social deduction party game where players parkour to school, answer trivia, and hunt down a hidden Class Clown who is sabotaging to try and make the entire group fail!

entries.name: Curse:The First Knot
entries.shortDescription: Some moments wish they never happened. After the accident you caused, you hide in a remote Anatolian village where secrets linger in the shadows of mosques. In this psychological horror by two developers, can you face your conscience? No escape. Only confrontation.

entries.name: IDLE: Intergalactic Defense League Exterminators
entries.shortDescription: An incremental game about blasting bugs, collecting guts, upgrading a base, and blasting more bugs!

entries.name: ME_iON
entries.shortDescription: ME_iON is an online multiplayer shooter game with offline base-building mechanics, that's weird wacky and funny there are also funny little watermelons with banana guns so what's not to love about that :D

entries.name: TOTAL DRIFTIN': Touge Dreams
entries.shortDescription: Master each corner, burn rubber, and become a legend high in the Japanese mountains. Total Driftin’: Touge Dreams is a tribute to classic '90s drifting, with precise arcade physics, retro aesthetics, and a cult-like soul. Do you have what it takes to become a touge god?

entries.name: Dragon Kisser
entries.shortDescription: Left alone as your little village’s last hope, you: Domingo, know what you must do to save your people and also pull a hot date, and that is to do what you know best: Romance the dragon attacking your home! Put your charisma to the test in this cheeky third-person soulslike boss battle!

entries.name: Goyslop
entries.shortDescription: Goyslop is a satiric Nazi Souls-like game, filled with the biggest conspiracy theories about Jews. Fight your way through bosses and make Hitler the ultimate victor.

entries.name: Project XZ
entries.shortDescription: PROJECT XZ is a high-octane fusion of platforming, action, and tower defense strategy. Shoot, brawl, and upgrade your arsenal of skills to tear through anything in your way and decide the fate of the future.

entries.name: Idle DeepMiner
entries.shortDescription: You control a living pickaxe capable of tearing through the world on its way to the core. Launch it downward, upgrade and modify it, and watch as a simple descent turns into a chaotic spectacle of explosions, lightning, and combos.

entries.name: Venomous Dalliances 💚
entries.shortDescription: The night can be dangerous for a woman alone. And even cabs know better than to stop in the darker parts of town. So what happens to this sexy lass when she’s discovered unprotected by the blue monster? Her frustration becomes need and hunger, and if she’s good, the rewards will be amazing!

entries.name: Ouch! Cargo!
entries.shortDescription: 4-Player Online Co-op. Push Carts & Loot Cargo. Troll Crewmates. Fight Beasts. Hit the Quota to Evacuate.

entries.name: One Tower Defense
entries.shortDescription: One Tower Defense is a Roguelike Tower Defense game where you control a single tower. Gather resources, buy weapons and upgrades, and fight endless waves of enemies. Play in single-player mode or in multiplayer mode, where the last survivor wins.

entries.name: 我的修仙日志 Cultivation Journal
entries.shortDescription: "Cultivation Journal" is an idle game that combines the aesthetics of text-based MUD with in-depth cultivation simulation.

entries.name: God For A Day
entries.shortDescription: In this narrative-based simulation game, you play as the Son of God. Your mission: Decide, bless or condemn city residents. Uncover the person's story through their items and secrets before making decisions. Your choices alter the city's destiny, and impact your revelation on Judgment Day.

entries.name: CARTAGRA
entries.shortDescription: Set in Ueno, Tokyo, where the wounds of the Pacific War have not yet healed, detective Takashiro Shugo becomes involved in a series of gruesome murders. A visual novel of love and hatred leading to obsession and madness…

entries.name: Touhou Russian Roulette
entries.shortDescription: Remilia's cake has vanished from a locked room in the Scarlet Devil Mansion! With the help of head maid Sakuya, play Russian roulette with a 12-gauge shotgun and punish the suspects. Good luck!

entries.name: Atelier's Key
entries.shortDescription: Atelier's Key is a dark-fantasy FPS set in a root-bound Victorian world inhabited by puppets. Severed from a hivemind and armed with a mysterious weapon; shoot, grapple, and unlock your way through this world to save a Father from his own damned creation.

entries.name: Glimvale : My Mini Overworld
entries.shortDescription: Glimvale is a solo cosy city-builder with idle mechanics where you manage, decorate, and grow a charming MMO village. Keep adventurers happy and shape the world at your own pace. After all, you’re the game master.

entries.name: Lord Of The Trough
entries.shortDescription: LOTT is about getting to the desired girth and claiming the superior oats. Enjoy the pastures of Svinwald with up to 5 other players. Live to impress the tall skinny ones. Compete in a range of mini-games to determine the superior pig. Serve up a range of undesirable slop to your ungirthed brothers.

entries.name: Raining Cats and Dogs
entries.shortDescription: It’s literally raining cats and dogs. In this game you platform, overcome about 100 unique obstacles, fight 3 janky bosses, find comments added from YouTube Shorts and make it stop raining cats and dogs by fighting Jeff in the end. Here's a message from Jeff: "YOU WILL NEVER STOP ME YEEEHAWWW"

entries.name: Oblivion Maiden
entries.shortDescription: An exploration adventure set in St. Dorothia Academy, a magical educational institution hidden deep within a forest. A story that begins with an encounter with a girl named Lulunya, and unfolds through mysterious phenomena and dream worlds.

entries.name: Professional Cats
entries.shortDescription: Professional Cats is a cozy collection of 4 mini-games where cats dressed in different professions challenge your observation and memory skills. Find, match, and organize them while competing on global leaderboards!

entries.name: Rob o Bot
entries.shortDescription: Rob o Bot is a survivors-like action game where you fight hordes of robots that began acting on their own after a mysterious virus infected a new generation of machines. Survive waves of enemies, upgrade your gear, and take back control before the machines take over.

entries.name: All Tomorrows: Invasion
entries.shortDescription: Resist extinction in this endless survival wave-based sci-fi shooter. Upgrade your weapons and harness far-future technology to survive as long as possible from a God-like alien race that threatens all of humanity.

entries.name: Archmage Idle
entries.shortDescription: An idle/incremental RPG where you're an Archmage of a wizard guild. Your skills bolster the frontlines and the supply lines. Every skill multiplies the others, and it all keeps running while you're away.

entries.name: Ice Cream Man
entries.shortDescription: ICE CREAM MAN is a first person PSX-style horror game. After a late-night gaming session, your walk home turns into a nightmare. Navigate unfamiliar backyards, jump fences and hide in the shadows to escape a murderous Ice Cream Man. Can you make it home alive? Or do you have a rocky road ahead?

entries.name: galaksia online
entries.shortDescription: Galaksia Online is an action-packed, 2D multiplayer space MMORPG blending retro pixel art aesthetics with mechanics. Forge alliances, custom-build your starships block by block, and engage in massive faction-based PvP wars or challenging PvE raid battles across dangerous stellar sectors.

entries.name: The Last Tale Told: Spam
entries.shortDescription: You live alone. Work from home. You haven't been out for days, trapped by endless rain. Every day your phone rings, it's an unknown number. “Suspected Scam” is what you read on the screen. You think it's just spam.

entries.name: Bardo
entries.shortDescription: It's Liar's Dice, until the loser rewrites the rules. Bluff up to 6 players online or AI rogues with minds of their own, then survive chaotic Event rounds: hide your hand, reveal all, bet on one face. Cozy tavern, ruthless mind games.

entries.name: Bottom Squad
entries.shortDescription: An idle defense game at the bottom of your screen. Build your squad, upgrade your base, and hold the line against relentless alien waves while you work or browse.

entries.name: GAMEBORO
entries.shortDescription: Works anywhere, knows everything. Get the info you need mid-game - no alt-tabbing, no distractions.

entries.name: Mushroots
entries.shortDescription: New RTS for everyone!

entries.name: Machinefall
entries.shortDescription: Machinefall is a post-apocalyptic real time strategy game set on a fully playable global map. Lead humanity’s last survivors as they build bases, gather resources, and wage massive battles against an overwhelming machine swarm. Progress through technological eras from Stone Age to Atomic Age.

entries.name: 魔法少女甜心3D Magical Girl Sweetheart 3D
entries.shortDescription: Magical Girl Sweetheart turns all scenes into dessert-themed wonderlands with match-link gameplay. There are 20 major scenes, each containing 3 renovation stages, with over 430 different desserts in total. There are no time limits, and players can unlock all achievements easily.

entries.name: Merlin Survivors
entries.shortDescription: Camelot is under threat! Merlin Survivors is a game where rogue-like action meets fast-paced survival challenges. Take control of legendary characters like Merlin, Arthur, Lancelot, and Morgana, and fight against relentless waves of enemies. Master each character.

entries.name: Mesozoic Dawn
entries.shortDescription: Mesozoic Dawn is a multiplayer online dinosaur survival game. Starting as a vulnerable juvenile dinosaur, you must navigate the perils of the prehistoric wilderness, utilizing the core "Growth + Nesting = Evolution" system to achieve leapfrog species iteration and evolution.

entries.name: Defracted
entries.shortDescription: Defracted - The world is set in a fictional sci-fi realm where 2 teams are at war with each other over prosperity in a virtual reality game created by an alien civilization.

entries.name: The Incident
entries.shortDescription: The Incident is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore a closed circus, destroy evidence before investigators arrive, and avoid someone still inside watching your every move.

entries.name: 8 Ball by Pokerist™
entries.shortDescription: Play the most realistic pool game with amazing graphics! Play for free with millions of players from all over the world!

entries.name: MuteX+
entries.shortDescription: MuteX+ is a challenging hack-and-slash that focuses on enemies that merge mid-fight. Make the most out of an unconventional moveset built around a slash, punch, and dash to cleave through the six Anobrite nests -- each ending with their own boss -- while mastering smooth mouse-controlled movement.

entries.name: Forgive Me My Love
entries.shortDescription: A first-person psychological horror game about the crushing weight of guilt. Live through the aftermath of a devastating tragedy: your wife is dead, and it’s your fault. But when her casket is brought home, something inexplicable and terrifying begins to warp your reality...

entries.name: HOP-CO-OP
entries.shortDescription: Master the HOP, then wreck your friends' runs in CO-OP. HOP-CO-OP is a first-person movement parkour game — race online, sabotage rivals with wild powerups, build your own maps, and deck out your character. Pure speed, pure chaos, better together.

entries.name: Shop of Deals
entries.shortDescription: Manage your own shop, buy and sell products, negotiate with customers, and grow your business by balancing risk, trust, and profit. At the same time, uncover the truth behind your father's disappearance.

entries.name: Battle Food Mania
entries.shortDescription: Food fights hit the streets! Battle Food Mania is a fast-paced, action game packed with humor and chaos. Play as pizza, cupcakes, bottles and more as you battle to deliver the box - or stop the delivery! Run, shoot and blast your rivals in wild food wars, play solo or with friends.

entries.name: The Serpent & The Seed
entries.shortDescription: A poetic narrative adventure retelling the greatest story in history - from the Garden of Eden to the end of the world - through stunning hand-drawn art, atmospheric puzzles, and a haunting original soundtrack.

entries.name: Dracs After Dusk
entries.shortDescription: Dracs After Dusk is an arcade, top-down shooter. Blast through bloodsuckers as the sharp shootin’ sheriff of a wild west town. Battle the deadliest bosses, claim weapons from the Armory to fuel your leaderboard topping run. It's an old school quarter muncher but luckily you have unlimited credits!

entries.name: sepapu
entries.shortDescription: Playing with a field of bits on the magical sandlight. A puzzle, it solved neatly.

entries.name: Cicadia
entries.shortDescription: Cicadia is a free rogue-like first person shooter indie game. Kill bugs and collect Bile as you uncover the hidden truth of a self-forsaken empire. Challenge bosses, cull swarms, and build an unstoppable loadout in Cicadia!

entries.name: Beghost
entries.shortDescription: BEGHOST is a narrative-heavy 2D action-adventure game set in the bowels of a haunted dungeon. Uncover the dungeon's darkest secrets with your ghost girl companion Bee, as you navigate your way through enemies, traps, and more, in a desperate attempt to escape!

entries.name: Forest Lookout
entries.shortDescription: Forest Lookout is a first-person horror game where you navigate a lost person in a forest to safety. You can choose beetween options in dialogs to them. Listen to them, keep track of them, use your map and lead them out of the woods.

entries.name: Tales from the Other Side: Beneath the Roots
entries.shortDescription: Psychological first-person horror. Fate brings you to your grandfather’s house, left abandoned after his mysterious disappearance. Explore it and uncover the dark secret hidden within.

entries.name: The Lost Mixtape
entries.shortDescription: Play as a raccoon with a cassette player, hunting for new tracks to dumpster dive to. Explore an abandoned mall and its surroundings to collect hidden cassettes. Dig through trash, uncover secret paths, and gather items. Experience this short adventure where someone's trash is a raccoon's treasure.

entries.name: One Death at a Time
entries.shortDescription: One Death at a Time is a first-person exploration game. You play as John, in the middle of a midlife crisis. A suspicious milk carton offers you a wish in exchange for 14 souls… but because you're a good person, you'll have to die yourself and explore the city in search of 14 ways to do it.

entries.name: Solendara
entries.shortDescription: Enigmatic Hack and slash style Action RPG where ancient mythology and magic blend with modern civilization~A story that reveals the forbidden, the desires, and the secrets of the world~

entries.name: FIRE The First Dreamer
entries.shortDescription: Uncover ancient secrets, summon totemic magic, decode enigmatic messages, and explore the majestic Preseli mountains of Wales in this open world adventure inspired by a true story. Dare to embark on this journey and rediscover the lost secrets of a life lived with purpose and meaning!

entries.name: Veil of Mist
entries.shortDescription: Life ends… but the story doesn’t. After death, you find yourself in a strange, distorted place where normal logic no longer applies. Explore, hide, solve puzzles, and try to figure out exactly where you’ve ended up.

entries.name: IT HEARS YOU
entries.shortDescription: A psychological horror game set in an abandoned hospital. A sound-sensitive creature hunts you. Stay silent, hide, and escape before it hears you.

entries.name: Hentai Overtime
entries.shortDescription: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Overtime, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

entries.name: Car Parkour 2 Together
entries.shortDescription: The legendary parkour chaos is back! Dive into 1-2 player action in Car Parkour 2 Together. Master massive ramps and deadly new maps with improved physics. Can your friendship survive?

entries.name: Blackjack: CHEAT THE HOUSE!
entries.shortDescription: Blackjack: CHEAT THE HOUSE! is a blackjack deck-building roguelike where you collect, buy, and upgrade "cheats" to beat the dealer. Work your way to $1,000,000 and unlock the 6 build trophies - cheat, win, repeat!

entries.name: Mini AirHockey
entries.shortDescription: Turn your undocked Steam Deck into a Mini AirHockey table for two. -- Mini AirHockey can only be played on an undocked Steam Deck.

entries.name: ESKINITA
entries.shortDescription: ESKINITA is a short atmospheric Filipino-inspired suspense horror game about working late nights in a small neighborhood lugawan and surviving the walk home through dark alleyways.

entries.name: Clubbed Seal
entries.shortDescription: Crush endless waves of monsters, build unstoppable upgrade combinations, and fight your way to the final boss in this fast-paced fantasy survival adventure.

entries.name: AikoMate
entries.shortDescription: Create your own AI desktop companion. Spend hours on your computer working, studying or chilling while having your little companion interacting and speaking with you! Fully customizable VRM avatars, personalities, voices, and real-time spoken interaction — your AI, your rules.

entries.name: Bind
entries.shortDescription: BIND is a slow-paced metaphysical puzzle journey set in the liminal realm between death and rebirth.

entries.name: Rind
entries.shortDescription: A sci-fi arcade shooter built on pure momentum. Dash, double-jump, punch, and gun through waves of robots closing in from every side. Every kill bursts neon explosions against the scorched metal. Never stop moving.

entries.name: Neofeud 2
entries.shortDescription: A cyberpunk sci-fi adventure of epic scope. A galactic empire enriches CEO-Kings, yet leaves Les Misérables hungry. An ex-robo-marine turned dancer, goth alien hacktivist, and billion-year-old mentor struggle to free e-minds, organize resistance, & overturn the cosmic Neofeudal chessboard for good.

entries.name: 100 Madagascar Cats
entries.shortDescription: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

entries.name: Sinner's Siesta
entries.shortDescription: Explore a sun-drenched Mexican village in this ultimate 3D adult sandbox. Choose your view, pick from dozens of detailed positions, and indulge in pure, unscripted passion with stunning interactive companions anytime, anywhere. No forced stories—just absolute freedom and endless pleasure.

entries.name: Ball Slickers
entries.shortDescription: Ball Slickers is a fast paced football party game mixing third person and top down action. Slide to steal the ball, kick to score, and outplay friends in chaotic, physics driven matches.

entries.name: NONEWORLD
entries.shortDescription: NONEWORLD is a cute RPG set in a dying world. You are a Princess from another world, accompanied by an omnipresent Cheshire Cat. Only you and your allies can return the Princess home safely.

entries.name: Neofold
entries.shortDescription: The infinite creature-collector where each pet is uniquely yours, generated live by your GPU. Hatch endless weirdos, adopt the ones you love, and grow a living sanctuary of species that exist only on your desktop.

entries.name: Hero of Sunset
entries.shortDescription: Venture into this retro pixel art action-adventure with an open world. Explore, fight, solve puzzles, challenge bosses — and, most importantly, you can romance the cute girls!

entries.name: Heavenly Island
entries.shortDescription: Become the “Great Seeder,” gather the 17 Golden Balls, and gain the favor of the island’s God in this adventure game by TechnoBrake!

entries.name: Venture
entries.shortDescription: Two astronauts awaken on an alien planet. With only minutes of oxygen left, they must work together to scale staggering cliffs, study strange lifeforms, and search for a way home in this atmospheric co-op survival adventure.

entries.name: Quack Quack Up
entries.shortDescription: Shout your ducks through the finish line in this voice-controlled party game where you win by screaming at the top of your lungs! Use your voice to herd a flock of ducks, but be careful: ducks can be a bit dumb, and a sneeze at the wrong moment can get them lost or, worse, falling off a cliff!

entries.name: Gene Crawl: Dungeon Descent
entries.shortDescription: > Die. Inherit. Evolve. Fight through dungeons, craft gear, brew potions, and collect relics — then die, pass your DNA to the next generation, and push deeper. Something is watching. Every death makes your bloodline stronger — but who benefits? An idle incremental RPG with a dark secret.

entries.name: Rogue 21
entries.shortDescription: The House always wins... unless you rewrite the code. In this blackjack-based roguelike card game, you don't just play the hand you break the system. Stack illegal exploits, distort probability, and bankrupt the Gamble-State. Hit. Stand. Exploit. Survive.

entries.name: Demonherd Dungeon
entries.shortDescription: The story of Gloria and Baal continues in Vinga, where our heroes will meet new and old friends and discover the secret buried inside an ancient labyrinth. The game plays like a dungeon crawler with cards.

entries.name: Dark Descent
entries.shortDescription: Dark Descent is a 4 player multiplayer cooperative horror game where you and your friends venture into an old elevator, aiming to reach the deepest levels. However, the journey won't be without it's challenges.

entries.name: VantGrid
entries.shortDescription: P2P voice & text chat, private by design. Your voice, files, and messages travel straight between you and your friends — they never touch someone else's server. The base is a one-time purchase, yours forever. The private alternative to the usual chat apps.

entries.name: B.O.B.Y's Journey
entries.shortDescription: Follow a robot’s journey to find the Spiritual Island, seeking the key to offering genuine emotional support while healing and transforming within, a story of resilience, self-discovery, and inner growth.

entries.name: Touhou Defense Tale ~ AI Test in Touhou ~
entries.shortDescription: A 2D Touhou fan game combining tower defense, tower merging, RTS-style control, and chaotic bullet-filled battles. Merge Touhou characters, build your defense, and compete for the fastest clear time on the leaderboard.

entries.name: Star Pact:Spirit Garden
entries.shortDescription: Star Pact: Spirit Garden is a gentle anime idle RPG where you form pacts with heroines, progress through automatic battles, dispatch expeditions, collect resources, deepen bonds, and rebuild a starlit fantasy garden through repeated ascension.

entries.name: Ocean Planet
entries.shortDescription: Button and Drop Bear live rent-free above their friend's steam bun shop. When their friend goes missing, it's up to them to figure out what happened and bring them home.

entries.name: Phantom Veil
entries.shortDescription: A story-driven psychological horror where you play as an investigative reporter drawn into a disturbing and dangerous case. Explore haunting, atmospheric environments, uncover hidden clues, solve intricate environmental puzzles, and confront the terrifying truth that was never meant to be revealed.

entries.name: The Host's deadly games
entries.shortDescription: The Host's deadly games is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore a mysterious house, uncover its dark past, and solve puzzles to survive.

entries.name: The Song Of WILL: ACT I
entries.shortDescription: Arise! This isn't the world you knew, but at least it's a cute one! Explore a turn-based, story driven JRPG that feels alive! Befriend strange, anthropomorphic creatures, wield bizarre, unique weapons, uncover secrets in an interactive world and...pet dancing bats? Just, don't look closer...

entries.name: Drop Jump
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced 3D rhythm platformer focused on precision and mastery. Play handcrafted levels, build your own, and challenge others through community-created content.

entries.name: When will I get Home?
entries.shortDescription: Indie anomaly-detection game set in a bleak Eastern-European stairwell. 11 floors, 40+ anomalies, minimal horror, maximal tension.

entries.name: Olga Doesn't Die
entries.shortDescription: The imperial family's advisor is a witch, a hag, the devil in disguise. A historical drama yuri visual novel set during a time of political tumult wherein an immortal finds both love and suffering.

entries.name: The Laws of Probability
entries.shortDescription: You have exactly 5. Bread is 4, the bus fare to school is 3. What do you give up? In this short narrative experience, you play as 13-year-old Adam. Confront an interface that reacts to a painful reality, and discover that freedom of choice is sometimes nothing but a privilege.

entries.name: Brazzante
entries.shortDescription: Featuring a unique doodle aesthetic, this world is entirely hand-drawn. Your goal? Use classic 'Rock, Paper, Scissors' mechanics to survive never-ending rounds.

entries.name: Conqueror's Stage
entries.shortDescription: No fixed maps. No scripted history. No tutorial treadmill. Conqueror's Stage is a real-time grand strategy across five ages - where every decision trades against another. Grand strategy, finally designed to be finished.

entries.name: Kamikaze Survivors
entries.shortDescription: Kamikaze Survivors is a top-down Roguelike where players command, equip, and level up battleships from WW1 to the present day. Participate in the First Blitz on London, Pearl Harbor, and Operation Epic Fury in command of history's most famous warships.

entries.name: Dreaming With Sharks
entries.shortDescription: Play as a Shark name Doc who is granted wonderful surgical abilities after given strange pills from a mysterious man. Doc excels at his surgeries, but suffers wild hallucinations. Progress each day with a variety of minigames and modifiers in order to become a surgery master!

entries.name: Sisyphus's Worst Day (again)
entries.shortDescription: Build traps, manipulate the environment, and engineer the perfect loop to keep Sisyphus from ever reaching the summit in this comedic isometric 3D puzzle game.

entries.name: Memo R.I.P.
entries.shortDescription: A first-person card game where horror isn’t constant: it appears only when the match decides. For 1–4 players with real-time voice chat, over 900 dynamic events, cursed progression, and a final boss waiting for the challenge.

entries.name: Operation Darkside DX
entries.shortDescription: Play as the Forren Foundation’s chief scientist to capture, study, and convert the Holy Core Battlemaidens into your loyal followers!

entries.name: Math Frenzy
entries.shortDescription: Solve fast arithmetic challenges across Brain Run, Arcade, and Battle modes. Build charm loadouts, chase high scores, survive branching runs, and compete locally against friends or CPU opponents.

entries.name: PinRogue
entries.shortDescription: PinRogue is a pinball roguelike. Build up points and multiplier by hitting bumpers, score satisfying combos, purchase powerful upgrades in the shop and create game-breaking builds!

entries.name: Step Lightly
entries.shortDescription: There’s no place like home - and yours is no home at all. Play as Rosa, a neglected child trying to escape her abusive family. Sneak out, but be ever so quiet. Mom is listening, dad is angry, and your big sister is always watching…

entries.name: Calculus of Rot
entries.shortDescription: Fight your way through zombie-infested wastelands in a turn-based tactical survival game. Reveal the map tile by tile, manage your health, choose your battles wisely, and survive against increasingly dangerous mutants lurking in the darkness.

entries.name: ALARIC
entries.shortDescription: May your wrath conquer the cursed beings and save the land. Fight like hell and avenge your father. Explore a giant castle filled with monsters and get stronger to withstand the forces of hell in this boomershooter, metroidvania adventure.

entries.name: Barbecue
entries.shortDescription: Barbecue is a co-op party game where 1 to 4 players manage a backyard BBQ that spirals into total chaos. Light the fire, grill the meat, serve the guests — and try not to burn everything down.

entries.name: 正体 SHOUT-AI
entries.shortDescription: This game contains psychological horror, unsettling dialogue, screen noise, blackouts, glitches, fake code logs, and effects that may appear as if something is happening on the player's PC. It does not contain gore, explicit sexual content, drug use, or realistic violence against real people.

entries.name: Café Manager
entries.shortDescription: Design it, manage it, own it! Create a cozy cafe, hire the best team, and turn your small business into the talk of the town. Customize every detail, keep your customers happy, and watch your profits grow. The best cafe is the one you build!

entries.name: Pedals in Panic
entries.shortDescription: Pedals in Panic is a small physics-based bike game where you control each pedal separately, steer with the mouse, jump over obstacles, and survive chaotic procedurally generated platforms.

entries.name: The Naysayer
entries.shortDescription: Disprove the accusations a seditious knight has brought against your rule. Find a way to defeat your foe in the arena, or refute his words in this text-based souls-like.

entries.name: Lust Horizons
entries.shortDescription: Lust Horizons is an open-world adult sandbox set in a massive, rusted Australian outpost. Customize ideal partners, explore a decayed industrial labyrinth, control camera or weather, and enjoy fully animated, uncensored 18+ content with absolute freedom!

entries.name: Supermarket Chaos
entries.shortDescription: Supermarket Chaos is a cozy organizing simulator where you sort 4,668 products in a messy supermarket. Enjoy the satisfaction of stocking shelves in a calm, relaxing atmosphere.

entries.name: Lullabies Made of Static
entries.shortDescription: The world is gone. In the silent aftermath of humanity’s fall, you explore the ruins of a post-apocalyptic megalopolis surrounded by industrial brutalist factories, collecting forgotten cassettes that will reveal what human emotions once felt like long ago.

entries.name: Deadly Warrior
entries.shortDescription: Deadly Warrior is a loot-driven Action RPG. Venture into a magical fantasy world, battle endless monsters, explore dangerous dungeons, and challenge powerful bosses. Collect vast amounts of equipment and rare treasures to create your own ultimate build.

entries.name: ALEK
entries.shortDescription: Post-soviet Russia, Tyumen in 1995. Alexey Smirnov, a local shot-caller, nicknamed 'Alek' found out about the death of his friends and swore to avenge. The bloody war started between the gangs of the city. However, a true enemy turned out not to be common gangsters, but men much scarier

entries.name: RAX
entries.shortDescription: RAX is a puzzle sandbox about light paths, logic, and modular construction. Place and rotate optical components to control the direction, color, and timing of light, activate targets, and package complex circuits into reusable blueprint chips.

entries.name: The Big Owl Night
entries.shortDescription: Survive a chaotic night in São Paulo with zombies, bosses and cursed upgrades in a fast-paced top-down roguelite. Collect weapons, trigger strange synergies, visit odd merchants and fight until the Big Owl lets you see another sunrise.

entries.name: Lockdown
entries.shortDescription: A short vehicle driving horror game

entries.name: Naughty Doug
entries.shortDescription: The family pet is a grown-ass man. It's a 'Doug’s life'-sim! Become a girl's best "friend" and guide her through a crucial period... or just get down and dirty! But don't raise the suspicion of your oblivious owner… or he will *fix* the problem.

entries.name: Incense Nook
entries.shortDescription: Run a small incense burner in the corner of your desktop. Place incense, let it burn, collect incense energy, and gradually unlock new burners and incense types.

entries.name: ENDLESS SIGNAL
entries.shortDescription: An idle hack-and-slash shooter with fast-paced progression, playable in the corner of your screen.

entries.name: HeartCore Descent
entries.shortDescription: Fly to the center of the planet to destroy its core! A simple yet challenging 2D Precision Platformer Indie game about flying a rocketship through various terrains, progressively getting harder and harder.

entries.name: How Much Is ?
entries.shortDescription: Test your math skills in an exciting FPS! Find the correct door to move forward. 100 islands await you with addition, subtraction, division, and multiplication. Hurry, the clock is ticking, and watch outeach island holds new challenges.

entries.name: STROZOWKA
entries.shortDescription: Operate the gate, let the cars in, and make sure the generator doesn’t die before dawn. People park here because it's cheap, but it’s their fuel that keeps your generator running. No cars means no fuel. No fuel means total darkness and trust me, you don’t want to be here when the lights go out.

entries.name: Trail of Gods: The Cursed Island
entries.shortDescription: A compact, cursed action RPG that lingers long after you put it down. Fight through a dying world armed only with precise timing and whatever gear you can scavenge from the fallen. One button + movement is all you need.

entries.name: Bee Streamer Idler
entries.shortDescription: Bee Streamer Idler is an overlay for streamers ! Engage your chatters by turning them into bees and work together to gather pollen and build honeycombs! Chatters use commands to control their bee. See how much honey can you collect together! Earn enough to collect all upgrades!

entries.name: Hentai Sexy Nurse
entries.shortDescription: 🎮 Hentai Sexy Nurse — an erotic anime game about a mysterious nurse. Solve puzzles, unlock hot scenes, earn achievements, and dive into a world of temptation and fantasy.

entries.name: PAPARAZZI
entries.shortDescription: Take sneaky pictures of the Stars, or find and eliminate the Paparazzis in this chaotic multiplayer game of stealth and social deduction.

entries.name: The Quiet Things
entries.shortDescription: Step into a fractured 00s childhood in the South of England. Inspired by the developer’s real diaries, this autobiographical narrative adventure invites you to uncover Alice’s story by piecing together evocative memories, and following in the footsteps of a young girl’s journey through adolescence.

entries.name: 二万分の一の雨粒達 - One in 20,000 raindrops
entries.shortDescription: Satoshi Kuga, who led a lonely high school life, was dreading the school trip starting tomorrow because he had been assigned to the same group as the popular clique. However, it seemed there were hidden tensions even within the group that appeared to get along so well at first glance.

entries.name: Phantom Fools
entries.shortDescription: A co-op roguelike about ghosts: possess objects, collect upgrades, turn into bosses, and escape the castle!

entries.name: Mana Fracture
entries.shortDescription: Mana Fracture is a 3D platformer with satisfying movement. Platform your way up a challenging series of levels in an open vertical map!

entries.name: Arcadie II: Cold Lands
entries.shortDescription: You are the Monarch. Choose between diplomacy and tyranny. Romance allies or enemies. Your decisions define your rule and the fate of those closest to you in this character-driven interactive tale.

entries.name: No Confidence Hearts
entries.shortDescription: An Adult Romance Visual Novel set inside 10 Downing Street during a twelve-week countdown to a vote of no confidence. Play as the PM's Director of Political Strategy navigating three romances where power, secrecy, and loyalty collide.

entries.name: Cricket Captain 2026
entries.shortDescription: Build your dream team with Cricket Captain 2026. Forty-five new playable domestic teams across Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Ireland, Sri Lanka and Zimbabwe, plus match engine and 3D highlights improvements, editor customisation, and faster gameplay throughout.

entries.name: Dino Pet Walker
entries.shortDescription: Dino Pet Walker is a Fantasy Casual Game where you realize your childhood dream and play with your dinosaur pet. On this adventure, be ready for solve puzzles and have fun with your and another dino's in a voxel art enviroment, inspired by brazillians biomes.

entries.name: Tarot Spell
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced typing survival game where you learn Tarot cards and combine their meanings to create powerful spells.

entries.name: The Hidden Room
entries.shortDescription: The Hidden Room is a relaxing erotic Arkanoid-style game where you break blocks, keep the ball in play, and gradually reveal seductive images of a charming maid.

entries.name: A Good Deed On Harris Avenue
entries.shortDescription: Untangle a web of wants and wishes from the residents of Harris Avenue in this brief PSX-styled puzzle-adventure game. Bask in the piercing heat of a summer afternoon, explore an intricately hand-crafted environment, and discover what A Good Deed On Harris Avenue has to say.

entries.name: Destruction of Heavenly Bliss
entries.shortDescription: A roguelite shoot 'em up with an oldschool aesthetic and an intense gameplay loop. Fight through 9 levels of a grueling training simulation, growing stronger with every loop, and realize ignorance truly is bliss.

entries.name: The Labyrinth on Burrow Hill
entries.shortDescription: Unravel a thread of riddles and mystery as you progress your way through the atmospheric halls of a dazzlingly large, long-deserted labyrinth. Explore the vistas of spectacular rooms and the hidden challenges within. Do you have what it takes to find what lies at the labyrinth's centre?

entries.name: Power and Glory
entries.shortDescription: Power & Glory is a fast-paced 2D action fantasy RPG where you rise from an outsider to power. Choose your origin, fight through dangerous dungeons, loot powerful items, gain skills, shape your build, and make choices that define your path and faction influence.

entries.name: Zombie Wasteland Together
entries.shortDescription: Zombie Wasteland Together is a 1–4 player co-op zombie shooter set in a post-apocalyptic desert. Team up with friends, fight endless hordes of infected, and survive using powerful weapons.

entries.name: BAENANA
entries.shortDescription: BAENANA is a fast top‑down bullet‑hell arena shooter where fruit heroes blast waves of hostile veggies. Boost power‑ups, fire up to six weapons, and dodge heavy enemy bullet fire while crafting powerful roguelike builds to survive chaotic shoot’em‑up action.

entries.name: Infinite Space: Mining
entries.shortDescription: Build and automate your own industrial space empire. Mine asteroids, manage logistics, expand production lines with drones and conveyors, explore new sectors through wormholes, and grow your mining operation across the galaxy.

entries.name: FAST FOOD FUNKIN'
entries.shortDescription: Have some beats with yo' mickey dee double-cheese. A high-caloric FRIDAY NIGHT FUNKIN' parody game made for the annual Flash Forward Jam on Newgrounds

entries.name: Punt! Rollin Raccoons
entries.shortDescription: The Raccoons are out and up to no good! Punt your very own Raccoon and cause havoc in this Pinball inspired arcade game. Destroy whatever is in your path, complete missions, and customize your rotund friend.

entries.name: Playful Pursuit
entries.shortDescription: Playful Pursuit is a colorful 3D adventure platformer where you jump, climb, solve puzzles, battle goofy enemies, collect VHS tapes, and build friendships with allies in a silly High Desert quest to rescue Eddy’s stolen teddy bear.

entries.name: Crazy Fruit Shooter
entries.shortDescription: One day you wake up and find yourself turned into a Fruitman? Face the endless waves of vegetables chasing you, grab your gun, and blast them away!

entries.name: Crazy Neighbour
entries.shortDescription: A psychological horror game set in a small post-Soviet town. You play as a troubled man, drowning himself in cheap beer while being pulled deeper into the shadows of his dark past.

entries.name: Elemental Magic Wars
entries.shortDescription: A hero-based 3D tower defense game featuring 9 elements, elemental reactions, RPG growth, gear drops, and thrilling battles. Command your heroes, build your defense, and face endless waves of elemental enemies.

entries.name: Age of Resistance
entries.shortDescription: Age of Resistance is a modern grand strategy set in South America. Manage your economy, internal stability, political ideologies, and regional conflicts in real-time with pause. Will you be able to dominate the continent?

entries.name: Deliverage
entries.shortDescription: Deliverage is a hardcore open-world PvP delivery game where every shipment is a gamble. Fight other players for valuable cargo, repair and modify fragile vehicles, outplay rivals in a shifting economy, and climb from nothing to the top of a ruthless world.

entries.name: Goo Deer
entries.shortDescription: Goo Deer is a dark, first-person gas station management game set in a foggy world addicted to the strange drink Goo Deer. Craft and sell Goo Deer, manage inventory, and hire employees. you venture into the misty forest to hunt deer for ingredients. avoiding a dangerous creature lurking in the fog

entries.name: Hidden Raccoons in Summer
entries.shortDescription: Hidden Raccoons in Summer is a cozy hidden object game set in vibrant summer themed pixel art worlds. Take your time, explore sunny environments, and find all the raccoons at your own pace!

entries.name: Journey to the King
entries.shortDescription: Journey to the King is a 2D pixel art platformer inspired by classic platformer games. You play as a knight on a quest through dangerous lands to reach the kingdom and help the king who urgently awaits your arrival.

entries.name: Raccoon Packer: A Cozy Puzzle Game
entries.shortDescription: Mischievous raccoons bring you the weirdest items to pack. Fit everything perfectly, add the right stickers, then ship it off. A cozy, satisfying packing experience with a touch of chaos.

entries.name: Bedtime Nightmare
entries.shortDescription: Complete nightly tasks and keep the lights alive. Survive what lurks in the dark.

entries.name: Summer at Smile Café
entries.shortDescription: Set out on a journey of love and smiles with 8 women in this 2D interactive adventure. You're a freelance artist who's working at home, getting scorched by the summer heat. So, you take your gear to the Smile Café! There's no way you could predict the escapades that are about to unfold...

entries.name: Half Dead: A Zombie Story Game
entries.shortDescription: In a world where humanity is fading, zombie Alex begins to change after seeing Sienna. A story woven with love, comedy, and sometimes tragedy. Watch interactive FMV scenes, explore comic panels, make choices, and reach the right ending.

entries.name: Mini Raid Leader
entries.shortDescription: Mini Raid Leader is a single-player Action RTS, in which you command an ever-growing party of heroes to take down powerful bosses.

entries.name: Glorpotron
entries.shortDescription: A tower defense roguelike about robots and ooze. Play solo or local multiplayer, protect the Glorp, and defeat the creeps.

entries.name: Bring The Rift
entries.shortDescription: Bring the Rift is a competitive puzzle-matcher blending frantic strategy with a Visual Novel narrative. Master unique skills to warp reality, launch attacks at rivals, and uncover the portal mystery in an epic story mode or intense local multiplayer duels.

entries.name: STEEL SERAPHIM: PROVING GROUNDS
entries.shortDescription: STEEL SERAPHIM: PROVING GROUNDS: Play as Aster, a lonely young pilot as he controls a colossal mech to fight off volcanic monsters. In between missions, romance your fellow pilots aboard the massive Faraday Station. Find love, survive in this hybrid third-person shooter/visual novel.

entries.name: Deluge
entries.shortDescription: Deluge is a horror-centric JRPG where you play as the resurrected warrior Hudson, a corpse tasked with infiltrating a battered community. Bound to a tyrant’s will, yet haunted by your own past, you must make choices and battle your path forward to either redemption or ruin.

entries.name: Demon Princess Retreat
entries.shortDescription: Fight enemies, Loot resources, and Extraction the map. Use your strategy and the least mana possible to create your own miracle of escape!

entries.name: Interaktivně o Liberci
entries.shortDescription: A first-person interactive film where you decide how the day unfolds during a visit to Liberec with someone you haven’t seen in ages. Choose your path, shape the experience — and be careful. One wrong choice might end everything.

entries.name: Lil' Quests
entries.shortDescription: Where every Quest ends in Laughs and Chaos. Lil' Quests is a sandbox, adventure, co-op game with wacky physics, funny moments, and horses!

entries.name: Skirmish
entries.shortDescription: Skirmish is a real time strategy card game where you use cards to summon units to fight each other.

entries.name: Never Trust a Fox
entries.shortDescription: A yuri horror visual novel about madness, fox girls, and forbidden love.

entries.name: Till Midnight
entries.shortDescription: TILL MIDNIGHT is a narrative-driven management simulation game with world-shattering consequences, inspired by true historical events. Navigate a darkly atmospheric vessel gripped by critical communication failures, trapped hundreds of meters below the surface.

entries.name: Naughty Nate : Tattoo
entries.shortDescription: Naughty Nate: Tattoo is a choice-driven adult RPG where you build intimate relationships with three captivating women. Flirt, seduce, raise affection levels, and shape Nate’s fate through your decisions.

entries.name: Smile and Play
entries.shortDescription: After a fun weekend at Smile Land, you realise you’ve left your wallet behind. Returning after hours to grab it feels harmless at first, until you discover this place is far from normal.

entries.name: Covet the Countdown
entries.shortDescription: You're Emmett Doyle, Mission Director on a rebuilt private rocket racing a Mars launch window that won't wait. Over one relentless night, three women collide with your countdown: a grounded commander, a brilliant trajectory lead, and a crisis fixer. Choose who gets your time, trust, and the truth.

entries.name: NINJA MASTER'S
entries.shortDescription: The 1996 arcade classic NINJA MASTER'S returns—upgraded and coming to Steam! Switch between armed and unarmed combat in an instant for high-speed,

entries.name: Cloudsea Frontier
entries.shortDescription: This is a classic long-form RPG inspired by the masterpieces of the 1990s JRPG era. It unfolds a story of adventure through the Cloud Sea world and saving the world.

entries.name: WinBolo
entries.shortDescription: A multiplayer top-down tank game for up to 16 players. Capture bases and pillboxes, harvest trees, build roads and walls, lay mines, and battle for control of the island. The Macintosh classic, rebuilt for modern platforms — free, open source, and cross-platform across desktop, mobile, and web.

entries.name: Dungeon Bomber
entries.shortDescription: Dungeon Bomber is a chain-reaction roguelite where you place bombs and blow through the dungeon. Drop a bomb each turn, earn coins, and upgrade your deck. Fuse bombs to boost range and effects. Defeat advancing monsters and destroy the required blocks before your HP runs out.

entries.name: Reverse Survivors
entries.shortDescription: A reversed survivors-like where you are sending waves of monster to stop the survivors.

entries.name: Zyntaris
entries.shortDescription: A roguelike survival game with co-op mode. Tear through thousands of enemies solo or with a friend. Unlock new heroes with unique abilities. Collect rare weapons and magical tomes, combine them, and discover insane synergies!

entries.name: Drawtris
entries.shortDescription: Drawtris is a legendary puzzle game distributed in 1984 China. Place tetrominoes with precision and complete each figure to achieve the highest score.

entries.name: Cascadium
entries.shortDescription: A simple idle game where you drop balls plinko-style to make money. Big number make head go brrrr.

entries.name: Melancholy Lake - Camocipher12 Shorts
entries.shortDescription: A surreal, abstract kinetic visual novel in which two girls go on a date in the middle of a broken world, using down-to-earth intimacy to survive the deteriorating nature and reality surrounding them.

entries.name: Crave the Burn
entries.shortDescription: In Northern California wine country, head winemaker Garrett Mercer races a wildfire and harvest deadlines as three women arrive with claims on his nights: an estranged heir, a rival vintner, and a catastrophe adjuster. One choice locks in your romance route. An Adult Romance Visual Novel.

entries.name: Duck Defender
entries.shortDescription: Duck Defender is a fast paced 2D wave defender. Collect coins and level up by defeating enemies! Select and buy infinitely stackable upgrades to progress through endless waves! Can you create the ultimate combo?

entries.name: Total Chaos Against Apathy
entries.shortDescription: A high-intensity action game, inspired by the feeling of emulating arcade-only action games. Learn a simple-yet-nuanced two button control scheme. Use hitstun, attack chains, grabbing and throwing to crush and control hordes of enemies! Tank Controls Are Awesome!

entries.name: DAMex : DArk Matter Exodus
entries.shortDescription: A challenging solo extraction shooter set in a hostile sci-fi world. Play as Quinn, a Dark Matter harvester stranded on planet Viridan — surrounded by deadly robots, fearsome bosses, hostile wildlife, and corporate lies. Harvest. Fight. Escape.

entries.name: Shards
entries.shortDescription: Shards is a single-player twin-stick shooter adventure game where you play as a clay robot. Fight your own kind, advance deeper into the Citadel and uncover its secrets.

entries.name: Assault On Sector 12
entries.shortDescription: A turn-based, squad-focused tactical defense game where your squad holds the line against advancing enemy waves.

entries.name: Tense Parking 2
entries.shortDescription: Tense Parking 2 is the second installment of the exciting parking simulator, which takes you to a bright and sunny metropolis!

entries.name: Relapse
entries.shortDescription: A beginner friendly sheet music rhythm game, with cute characters and a shady organization!

entries.name: Kitty Witchy
entries.shortDescription: A little lost witch, a magical cat, and a world full of secrets. Kitty Witchy is a 3D narrative puzzle adventure game. Join the witch and solve puzzles with the help of her cat, uncover the secrets of this universe, and find the way back home.

entries.name: The Dreamers Foresight
entries.shortDescription: A third-person roguelike deck-builder where every run is different. Play as a ninja - fight or stealth your way through nightmares. Build your map by placing randomized biome tiles. Align similar tiles for better rewards. Build a powerful deck from a variety set of cards while balancing your energy.

entries.name: Sign Off Affair
entries.shortDescription: You're Miles Hale, showrunner of a canceled late-night show with six tapings left. Three women pull you in three directions: your head writer, your returning star, and the network exec dismantling the show. An adult romance visual novel with three distinct routes and explicit scenes.

entries.name: Puzzles: Fish
entries.shortDescription: This game is a classic puzzle game with multiple levels and beautiful graphics. Enjoy!

entries.name: 50 Years Classic
entries.shortDescription: 50 Years Classic is a minimalist turn-based strategy game where you can choose from a variety of nations, each with its own unique feature. The game offers fast, engaging gameplay with high replayability. This is a free version of the game "50 years".

entries.name: Just Pool
entries.shortDescription: Just Pool is a minimalist 8-ball pool game. Score all your balls to win the match, play with friends or solo.

entries.name: Mine of my Mind
entries.shortDescription: This is a horror where you play as a miner experiencing a midlife crisis. The final shift before a long-awaited promotion goes wrong: reality begins to warp, turning a workday into a nightmare. Will he be able to escape the depths of his own mind?

entries.name: MyBiz: Pomodoro Desk Tycoon
entries.shortDescription: A cozy pixel-art office sim powered by your real Pomodoros. Focus sessions earn cash + XP — decorate, hire staff, level up. Music, ambience, break-time minigames. Productivity tool by day, tycoon by every minute.

entries.name: Mythopolis
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced low-poly roguelike set in a 20th-century American town. Fight against mythological creatures from around the world, adapt your strategy each run, and survive the growing chaos.

entries.name: Shrapnel Sentinel
entries.shortDescription: Shrapnel Sentinel is an arena based FPS with an emphasis on defence. Tasked with defending the final Pillar of Reality, you must take up the mantle of the Sentinel. Sacrifice your life in the shadow of The Pillar.

entries.name: Towers Saga
entries.shortDescription: Guide humanity by building grand towers in this 3D Match-3 falling blocks puzzle game. Recall the greatest tale of them all and witness the wonders of the ancient world in Babylon, Egypt, Atlantis, and much more!

entries.name: Tired
entries.shortDescription: High-speed cyberpunk time trial racing. Master 18 tracks with tight controls, instant restarts, and no distractions—just you, the clock, and the push to go faster. Your biggest rival is your own skill.

entries.name: Hentai Flesh
entries.shortDescription: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Glacial, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

entries.name: 刻命花嫁 Möbius Brides
entries.shortDescription: After receiving a letter from his deceased lover, the man visits a mysterious mansion. His memories begin to blur, and he gradually sinks into a vortex of desire, dreaming only of being reunited with her… Animated VN featuring 5 beautiful women with a touch of horror.

entries.name: Swordless
entries.shortDescription: A broken sword... The left hand controls the hilt, the right hand guides the blade. They work together to reach the end, and unite as one!

entries.name: EchoLink: Recursion
entries.shortDescription: EchoLink: Recursion is an active incremental hacking simulation spanning 1990s dial-up to 2150s megacities. Hack through time by infiltrating networks, building proxy chains, and automating routines. Every reset reboots you with exponential upgrades. Grow a skill tree and rewrite history.

entries.name: Pore Cleaning Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Grab, pull, and pop blackheads out. A weirdly satisfying pore-cleaning simulator.

entries.name: Rise Of Eurevia
