entries.shortDescription: Defeat powerful enemies in dungeons to earn legendary equipment! Rise as a mighty warrior of your faction and dominate your rivals on the battlefield !

entries.name: StellarUniversity:FurryHearts
entries.shortDescription: Stellar University: Furry Hearts -Play as Leo, a first-year student, and meet four furry classmates on campus—unfolding a love story that’s yours to shape. Featuring multiple endings, intimate daily moments, and romantic vibes.

entries.name: Sex Passion and Lust
entries.shortDescription: Sex Passion and Lust is the ultimate adult open-world sandbox game where your deepest fantasies come to life. Indulge in fully animated, uncensored sex scenes (solo, partner, and group), deep character customization, and complete cinematic control. No filters. No limits. Just pure, raw freedom.

entries.name: Aéro: speedrun labyrinthe
entries.shortDescription: A third-person speedrun puzzle game set in a mysterious sci-fi laboratory. Complete experimental rooms, master your route, improve your best time, follow Aves’ voiced guidance, and search for the 12 hidden bonus eggs.

entries.name: Sweet Dance
entries.shortDescription: A next-gen 3D dress-up rhythm dance game. Mix and match a vast collection of fashionable outfits, master the hottest dance moves, and unlock trending TikTok hits. Meet new friends and embark on a sweet romantic journey!

entries.name: 真弓-Mayumi-
entries.shortDescription: This is a Japanese horror game that features a woman who works at a hospital as the main character.

entries.name: Cook & Click
entries.shortDescription: A culinary management clicker game where you chop ingredients, unlock new categories, and open new locations. Automate your production, purchase upgrades to boost profits, unlock special abilities, and compete for challenging achievements. An addictive, endless progression experience.

entries.name: EVIDENCE
entries.shortDescription: EVIDENCE is an atmospheric neo-noir detective thriller. Investigate murders, narcotics trafficking, underground casinos, disappearances, arson cases, robberies, and strange incidents that slowly begin connecting into something far bigger.

entries.name: 挂机破坏神 IdleDiablo
entries.shortDescription: 《IdleDiablo》is a Diablo-inspired idle loot game. Earn resources while idle, build your equipment & skills, and conquer all foes!

entries.name: Myriad Realms
entries.shortDescription: Rare pure single-player retro 2D side-scroller on Steam. Recreates classic MMO golden-era vibe, no pay-to-win, no IAPs, no forced social. Enjoy pure, stress-relieving fun of slaying monsters, hunting loot, and free exploration.

entries.name: Huntsman Against Darkness
entries.shortDescription: A dark roguelite action experience where you fight through endless hordes of corrupted creatures, free your family and rebuild the village. Survive brutal arena battles, unlock powerful upgrades, defeat massive bosses, and rebuild a fallen medieval village one run at a time.

entries.name: Cultivation: Mystic Realm of Spirit Mountain
entries.shortDescription: You'll explore uncharted spirit mountains teeming with spirit plants, stones, treasures, and beasts. Gather resources, grow plants, refine pills to advance, with spirit roots, skills, and pets aiding your relaxed cultivation. Begin your journey!

entries.name: Quacky
entries.shortDescription: Meet your digital duck: feed it, play with it and watch it age. Earn drops with time, trade them on the marketplace, and endlessly optimize your device for maximum quack efficiency.

entries.name: Ash of Gods: Tactics
entries.shortDescription: Build and upgrade your deck to fight other players, face challenges in the story mode, experiment with your tactics as tactics decide everything!

entries.name: Star Witch
entries.shortDescription: A dark fantasy action RPG where a fallen witch reshapes the world. Explore dangerous dungeons, fight twisted enemies, and grow stronger through immersive combat and powerful gear. Power demands a price.

entries.name: HAUNTMATES
entries.shortDescription: Co-op horror investigation game across multiple maps. Enter procedurally generated environments, use your equipment to gather clues, and identify the entity. Watch your back, because monsters are hunting you down.

entries.name: ユレイシア英雄戦記　- Chronicle of Arstenia500 -
entries.shortDescription: 戦局を読み、一手ずつ難所を切り開く王道本格SRPG。盤面を読み、仲間の特性を見極めて難所を突破せよ。戦乱のユレイシア島を巡る王道戦記。

entries.name: Damn Zombies
entries.shortDescription: Dive into fast-paced, old-school multiplayer arena combat! Battle it out in a tight, claustrophobic maze of industrial shipping containers where danger lurks around every corner. Choose your class, lock and load your arsenal, and rack up frags in non-stop, adrenaline-fueled Deathmatch action.

entries.name: Demon Protocol
entries.shortDescription: Lock On. Light Up. Lay Waste. Demon Protocol is a retro arcade space shooter with 25 waves of relentless enemies, 4 brutal bosses, and power-ups to keep you fighting. Choose your difficulty and see how far you can push before the demons win.

entries.name: Skulls Skulls Skulls by Daniel da Silva
entries.shortDescription: Skulls Skulls Skulls is a short active Incremental game. Fire spells at the cave, get skulls, spend skulls on yourself and get more and more powerful!

entries.name: ELYSIUM : Blue Den Mansion
entries.shortDescription: A first-person psychological horror game where you explore a mysterious mansion, solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and survive a terrifying creature lurking in the shadows.

entries.name: Wizzerd Quest 2
entries.shortDescription: STOP THE DARK WIZZERD!!! Wizzerd Quest 2 is a retro first-person RPG with unhinged live-action FMV cutscenes, full splitscreen co-op, exciting boss encounters, and a vast open world to explore! Save the Roblins! Save the World! A standalone sequel to the shareware classic Wizzerd Quest!

entries.name: Poem of the Starherd
entries.shortDescription: A relaxing farming simulation game where you take care of humanoid spirits in a mysterious world. Grow crops, raise spirits (animals), live together with someone you love, and enjoy fun-filled days with a variety of approaches!

entries.name: Summer Days in the Joyful Countryside
entries.shortDescription: Welcome your nieces to your rural home to help them enjoy a summer vacation of relaxation, farming, and gaming!

entries.name: When Stars Collide
entries.shortDescription: In this sci-fi romance visual novel, join the crew of The Ophelia after awakening from a 500 year slumber. Forge new bonds, find romance, and unlock a secret that could change the galaxy's future.

entries.name: Hentai World Forest
entries.shortDescription: Clear the grid by using logic to avoid hidden mines and flag threats. This minimalist puzzle game offers strategic, timeless brain training and satisfying gameplay at your own pace.

entries.name: DRUMP SIMULATOR
entries.shortDescription: A satirical game where you make choices and play mini-games as the American President Tonald Drump.

entries.name: Definitely Not a Cult
entries.shortDescription: Build your “totally normal” community, upgrade your base, gather weird resources, recruit suspiciously calm members, and pretend the red flags are just decorative. Manage the chaos, unlock content, earn achievements, and do not ask why everyone keeps talking about pyramids.

Trapped in a mysterious space shrouded in an unsettling atmosphere, a unknown presence creeps up from behind— "it" doesn't move while you're watching. But the moment you look away, it closes in without a sound. Can you escape "it" and find your way out of this enigmatic space?

entries.name: Battle Medal: Super Auto Chess Swarm War
entries.shortDescription: Welcome to Decisive Battle: Medals! A fantasy realm fusing lite-Roguelike and auto-battler, blending tower defense with army spamming. Each medal brings a unique experience. Command 80+ units, master 16 synergies, and craft 10+ exclusive medals. Explore, conquer all lands, and drive out the invaders

entries.name: Where Is Mommy
entries.shortDescription: Trapped in a bazaar that twists with every turn, you are a lost child searching for your mother. Watch for subtle anomalies in the shifting environment to survive the loop. In this retro-inspired world, nothing is as it seems. Can you find her before the cycle swallows you whole?

entries.name: SoundRelay
entries.shortDescription: A simple desktop soundboard that lets you play audio clips directly through your microphone in any game or voice chat. Instantly expand your collection of audio clips with full Steam Workshop and Linux support. Perfect for streamers or trolling your friends!

entries.name: Fabricatio
entries.shortDescription: Build efficient production lines, automate resource transport, and master complex logistics in a 2D factory-building experience focused purely on automation.

entries.name: HexLemma
entries.shortDescription: Constraint-satisfaction puzzle on a hexagonal grid. Six clue families, eight board shapes, four difficulties, a 25-level campaign, infinite puzzle generation and a deterministic daily challenge shared by every player worldwide. Full controller support. Steam Deck ready.

entries.name: The Minesweeper
entries.shortDescription: The classic game of minesweeper from a fresh new perspective. Play alone or with a friend in this third person puzzle game, where you toss grenades, plant flags, and math a path to victory. Enjoy the calm of nature, chill tunes and chaotic reveals.

entries.name: Dynasty!
entries.shortDescription: Unlock your players. Build your playbook. Grow your stadium. In this American Football deckbuilder, every win is shaped by your Play Cards, Player Cards, and stadium upgrades.  With over 1.3 billion possible team combinations, win championships your way and build a true Dynasty!

entries.name: 大荒消劫录
entries.shortDescription: 在国风画卷中展开智斗！《大荒消劫录》是一款将三消与策略对战深度融合的游戏，通过精巧消除来组合技能、搭配英雄阵容，在实时对战中决胜千里。玩家通过精妙的消除进行战斗，每一局都是对策略的直接考验。收集拥有独特技能和属性的英雄，自由搭配您的战斗小队。理解每位英雄的特性，组合出能产生奇妙协同效应的阵容，是克敌制胜的关键。融合“六十四卦”系统，为战局带来无穷变数。将卦象之力与英雄技能相结合，催化出独一无二的战斗风格与战术。

entries.name: Luxmithar
entries.shortDescription: Defend a crashed forge in this 2D survival defense roguelite. Expand a modular world grid, build towers and traps, and survive relentless enemy waves across shifting days, storms, and darkness.

entries.name: Beat Pet
entries.shortDescription: A desktop pet who listens to music with you and plays the drums along to the beat. Most of the time, he quietly keeps you company. But when the music starts, the stage is his.

entries.name: Ploy Co.
entries.shortDescription: Welcome to Ploy Co.! A Puzzle game where you lead unsuspecting employees into traps, steal from their desks, prank call employees, and destroy an otherwise harmonious workforce in the name of making a safer place!

entries.name: Isekai x Isekai
entries.shortDescription: "Isekai × Isekai" is a casual 2D idle desktop game. Explore forests, journey into space, earn coins, collect new companions (including hidden characters), and build your own world.

entries.name: Ascension of the Dead
entries.shortDescription: Kick, yeet, and explode your way through undead chaos in this fast-paced zombie shooter with brutal physics and over-the-top action.

entries.name: FOCUS
entries.shortDescription: Surveillance footage is slowly being rewritten. A point-and-click observation horror game where you find what changed and report it.

entries.name: Operation P.L.U.S.H
entries.shortDescription: Operation Plush is a 1-4 player horde defender where you take control of dream-powered plushies defending your child's nighlight from the encroaching nightmare horde. Protect the dream, Defend the nightlight, Defeat the darkness

entries.name: An Adventure in Arabic
entries.shortDescription: An Adventure in Arabic is a series of games that teaches Arabic Language. Chapter One, introduces Arabic Alphabet. Learn the various shapes and pronunciation of each letter while enjoying playing an Adventure RPG. The game has something to offer for all ages, feature rich and full of activities.

entries.name: Seven Rounds
entries.shortDescription: Parry to reload. A neon top-down roguelite where every bullet is earned — deflect attacks to refill your revolver, chain perfect parries for slow-motion charged shots, and survive an endless swarm of geometric foes. No parry, no bullets.

entries.name: Infinite Bread
entries.shortDescription: Infinite Bread is a bread-themed idle AFK casual game You are a giant loaf, endlessly feeding your breadfolk. Spend bread to expand your realm, watch your empire flourish, and enjoy soaring numbers. feed millions while your hands stay free for other royal duties.

entries.name: Trolley Time
entries.shortDescription: Cute animals shopping for groceries - what chaos could possibly ensue? Play solo or with up to three friends in this bite-sized game, engaging in frantic action as you try to deliver as many groceries as possible within the time limit!

entries.name: The Unrealtor
entries.shortDescription: A couch co-op puzzle adventure where two players navigate a surreal house tour, solving perspective-based puzzles by matching objects across their splitscreen, and uncovering a shifting maze of impossible architecture.

entries.name: Alfons World
entries.shortDescription: Collect magical creatures called "Papas" in a vast world, have them engage in battles, build structures, farm, and produce industrial goods. This is a brand new open-world survival crafting game.

entries.name: 这张不算 This One Doesn't Count
entries.shortDescription: "This One Doesn't Count"—You lived to 40, buying lottery tickets every single day, never winning once. On your deathbed, God reveals: "Everyone who won was cheating." Reborn for one more try, do whatever it takes to pay your daughter's tuition before exam day. Scratch-card × Roguelite.

entries.name: OFS
entries.shortDescription: Survive five one-minute shifts in a fast arcade horror game. Sort cargo, purge suspicious packages, block three little intruders, earn bounty, buy hacks and renew medical insurance between shifts. Short runs, sharp pressure, corporate nonsense.

entries.name: CHIPSTACK
entries.shortDescription: A desktop idle casino that runs while you game, queue, browse, or work — earning chips every second. Auto-play blackjack, slots, roulette with your bets and strategies. Plus 3 quick-play games like Video Poker. Toggle card counting, equip powerful mods or play pure, and chase the highest chipstack!

entries.name: Rescue Dogs vs Aliens Tower Defense
entries.shortDescription: Command heroic rescue dogs in a colorful tower defense battle against alien invaders. Build, upgrade, unlock heroes, defend strange battlefields, and survive wave after wave in RDVA-TD: Rescue Dogs vs Aliens.

entries.name: A surgery beyond the heart
entries.shortDescription: A medical student. An interrogation room. A surgeon who almost didn't survive.A Surgery Beyond the Heart is a noir visual novel set in a small Ohio city in 2016. You piece together what happened — and why — through memory, silence, and the things a person chooses not to say.

entries.name: Jiaobei: Ask the Divine
entries.shortDescription: Jiaobei is a desktop tool based on the traditional Chinese divination practice of casting moon blocks to seek guidance from the divine. Before casting, state your name, address, birth date, age, and question. The system then interprets the result automatically.

entries.name: Company Rising
entries.shortDescription: In this business simulation game, you take on the role of an entrepreneur, starting with a small team of just a few people and gradually building your very own corporate empire, step by step.

entries.name: Zombie Queen
entries.shortDescription: Fight through 100 waves of massive zombie hordes in this fast-paced wave-based shooter. Blast up to 1,000 zombies with powerful weapons, earn upgrades, level up your character, and survive the apocalypse.

entries.name: JULPAE
entries.shortDescription: JULPAE is a free-to-play 4-player online card battle game with a Korean-inspired atmosphere. Learn the flow quickly in 1v1 duels, then infer hidden teams, play or pass, and read the match through timing, decisions, and mind games.

entries.name: 관상
entries.shortDescription: 조선 시대 관상가로 위장해 수배자를 색출하는 추리 생존 게임. 매일 찾아오는 손님의 얼굴을 관찰하고, 수배 조건과 대조해 신고하세요. 잘못된 판단은 불이익으로, 올바른 판단은 생존으로 이어집니다. 30일 후 당신의 선택이 4가지 엔딩 중 하나를 결정합니다.

entries.name: 人生记事簿：Life Memoirs
entries.shortDescription: A choice-driven text game about living an ordinary life in modern China. Shape your path through study, work, love, and family, and see how your future unfolds year by year.

entries.name: Fight or Flight
entries.shortDescription: Battle Royale and Extraction that blends PvP and PvE, You are a operative that will drop into the infected region and attempt to recover artifacts and eradicate the infected.Each player is pitted against Zombies, Monsters and each other. Online or Single player for practice with bots!

entries.name: Junkster
entries.shortDescription: Junkster is a 3D action platformer with an awesome building mechanic. Plucky little construction bot, UM-13 (or Um for short), has crash-landed on a dangerous junkyard planet. Armed only with his trusty robo-wrench, Um must repair his ship and recover his lost cargo of precious human artifacts.

entries.name: The Order of Things
entries.shortDescription: The Order of Things is a short first-person horror memory puzzle game. New objects appear one by one. Remember what was added, choose them in the correct order, and escape before your mistakes run out.

entries.name: Spitter
entries.shortDescription: Your tongue is your engine. The table never stops. The pockets are waiting.

entries.name: 扑克迷阵 Poker Matrix
entries.shortDescription: In this turn-based poker strategy game, you and the AI take turns selecting five adjacent cards from the board, forming poker hands to determine the winner and earn chips. Convert your chips into points round by round to unlock more game modes!

entries.name: Pollux The Hero in The BOX
entries.shortDescription: Charge ahead with “INVINCIBILITY”! A Unique 2D Action Game set in a Weird World, brought to life with Retro Pixel Graphics!

entries.name: Cat Store
