entries.shortDescription: Pilot a mech through the dark unknown, upgrade it in-between expeditions, and ensure the mech's safety until it reaches extraction. Your own safety is optional.

entries.name: Bal Institute
entries.shortDescription: Work fun jobs, conquer minigames, and win the hearts of eight women as you explore the lively dating‑life of Bal Town.

entries.name: Solderia - Fall of Kings
entries.shortDescription: Build your kingdom, train armies, forge alliances, and fight for the throne in Solderia: Fall of Kings, a medieval strategy game where every decision shapes your rise to power.

entries.name: The Tartarus Loop
entries.shortDescription: Play as a copy of Theseus. Run around in a maze, having to defeat the very Minotaur in Tartarus after it perished by the hands of the original Theseus. Over and over again. The soul of the Minotaur can't rest. All it can do is chase the player and try to outsmart you.

entries.name: Eyes of the Forest
entries.shortDescription: A third-person stealth adventure set in a quiet, post-human woodland where survival depends on patience, observation, and restraint. Towering ruins, tangled roots, and dimly lit paths create an environment where every movement matters and safety is never guaranteed.

entries.name: Worm Life
entries.shortDescription: Play as a worm and live your Worm Life while sharing resources with other worms. Grow and evolve to make sure you are the dominate worm of the area.

entries.name: Naked Man
entries.shortDescription: A pixel art platformer where you swing upward through the jungle using vines and ropes — all the way to outer space!

entries.name: Codex Combat
entries.shortDescription: Create a legendary spellbook to battle history's greatest mages in this arcane autobattler! Pick a hero, fill your codex with powerful sigils, cast mighty spells, discover ancient relics, and fulfill your destiny in this turn-based online PvP arena.

entries.name: ISLAND OF VALKYRIES
entries.shortDescription: Hentai Visual Novel; turn-based combat with questions. Answer correctly to unlock content and endings. Improve stats with shop items. Includes adult content and moderate violence.

entries.name: Coastal Summit Sports: College Athletics 27
entries.shortDescription: Become the Athletic Director in this deep collegiate sports management simulation. Build a multi-decade dynasty by allocating budgets, directing NIL funds, upgrading facilities, and hiring coaches across a massive roster of simulated sports, from football to rowing.

entries.name: Space Invasion Infinite
entries.shortDescription: A 2D retro action rogue-like game inspired by the original Space Invaders arcade experience. Shoot down incoming alien waves and upgrade your turret. Discover and defeat bosses, and unlock permanent upgrades, turret classes, and challenging difficulty modifiers!

entries.name: The Therapist Impostor
entries.shortDescription: "Dr." Trigger, a man with no experience whatsoever, starts a therapy clinic. Will he cave under the pressure, or can he fake it till he makes it? Become the worst therapist ever (on purpose)! An interactive FMV comedy experience with dozens of choices, branching paths, and over 90 total endings!

entries.name: Pion's Theorem
entries.shortDescription: Solve equations. Build decks. Break the system. A math-fueled deckbuilding puzzler where you combine number and operator cards to hit the target. Master four modes — Puzzle, Daily Challenge, Competitive, and Strategy — with π at your side. Casual to pick up. Dangerously deep to master.

entries.name: Bella Cozy Island
entries.shortDescription: A cozy life sim set on a sun-soaked tropical island. Run a seaside café, explore the island, and enjoy the slow rhythm of island life as Bella

entries.name: Veles: Rise of the Damned
entries.shortDescription: A dark fantasy action roguelite where you battle endless hordes, forge powerful builds, and survive against overwhelming odds in a world inspired by Slavic mythology.

entries.name: Finding Lake Chewaucan
entries.shortDescription: You’re a time-traveling detective with a bone to uncover. Hunt for clues, solve puzzles and complete minigames to unlock pieces of the past and identify fossil animals.

entries.name: Desktop Snail Assassin
entries.shortDescription: A idle desktop snails-like. Every now and then the murderous snail assassin is hunting your mouse cursor, turning your desktop into a chaotic bullet hell. How long can you survive?!

entries.name: EVEN OR ODD 1
entries.shortDescription: "Even? Odd? Forget the math!" Enter the Collatz Conjecture—mathematics' greatest unsolved mystery—reimagined as a high-speed roguelike action game. Play as "Ichi," the muscle-brained magical girl, teleporting between lanes to smash back incoming numbers with charge shots!

entries.name: Onsen 1313
entries.shortDescription: Onsen 1313 is a first person retro horror game set in an abandoned feudal Japanese Bathhouse. Explore the confined environment, discover the horrors that are locked inside and find a way to escape the nightmare.

entries.name: The Office Void
entries.shortDescription: You’re stuck on the night shift. The code refuses to compile, the deadline is on fire, and your mind is no longer yours. To keep from passing out and blowing the entire shift, you have to drink coffee. Lots of it.

entries.name: Zetrya: Dungeon Dive
entries.shortDescription: A group of adventurers work their way through a dungeon with the goal of clearing it. Finding new threats along the way.

entries.name: StyxVenture
entries.shortDescription: A hand-drawn RPG set in a little corner of Hell - a very monochrome place. Master the seven Sins, face off against a variety of demons (and other creatures) and find your way to freedom!

entries.name: BalanceUP
entries.shortDescription: Keep your balance. One mistake, and you lose everything. Climb unstable platforms while carefully maintaining your footing. Simple controls, brutal difficulty, and endless retries await. Perfect for players who enjoy challenging games and streamers seeking intense, reaction-filled moments.

entries.name: Integrity
entries.shortDescription: If grid-based, board-game-like turn-based combat has ever felt restrictive to you, experience Integrity. Move freely, destroy or create terrain with your skills, and manage line of sight and stamina in a turn-based tactical RPG where every decision can decide the outcome.

entries.name: CELESTIAL: FIRE & FORGE
entries.shortDescription: An incremental clicker game where you HEROICALLY… click a button to light a fire. That’s it... The fire makes ash, you assign recipes to arcane forges, materials appear, upgrades unlock, numbers go up, and somehow.... you’re still optimizing it all. Repeat forever.

entries.name: Ah Spare Me Giantess
entries.shortDescription: Experience a thrilling 3D magic shooter! Play intense 5v5 PvP or challenge Bots in Stage Mode. Master your spells and win the arena, because if you lose, you will be vored by a giant anime girl! Get ready for a unique, action-packed scale-play fantasy.

entries.name: At Run Time
entries.shortDescription: At Run Time is a first-person parkour game focused on speed, precision, and risk-taking. After stealing an energy source from a smuggler’s hideout, escape through deadly traps using advanced movement skills before time runs out.

entries.name: Dual Core Sync
entries.shortDescription: Your brain has two sides, and one of them has to break: a high-difficulty, brain-splitting game that forces single players to handle "two-player co-op" solo.

entries.name: Nomnomia
entries.shortDescription: Consume enemies to steal their abilities and survive by managing your HP. Fight for survival on the mysterious planet Nomnomia in this food-chain action shooter.

entries.name: Escape the Red Curse
entries.shortDescription: A group of mediums is trapped in a cursed apartment. Explore the environment, find your comrades, and solve logic puzzles. Lift the curse, and escape before it’s too late.

entries.name: Gaslamp Cases 7: The Faith of Rasputin
entries.shortDescription: Can you help Morgan solve the case of a mysterious drug, spreading throughout the city of London? Solve exciting match-3 puzzles, collect important clues, and uncover the truth in this gripping adventure!

entries.name: Resurection.
entries.shortDescription: Resurrection is a wave-based indie FPS by Bad Dev Studios. Fight endless, aggressive zombie hordes in a burning city. spend points at the random weapon box for better firearms, manage your ammo, and use precision sniping to survive increasingly difficult waves.

entries.name: Toy's Dream
entries.shortDescription: Toy’s Dream is a cute and wholesome puzzle-platformer. You are a Hero, who sets out on a journey to save the town that has been attacked by the Demon Lord. He must overcome many obstacles along the way, using glue and thread...

entries.name: The Wedding
entries.shortDescription: Get ready for romance, laughs, and wild choices in 'The Wedding,' a Visual Novel where your choices matter. Fake date, elope, or sabotage a wedding – your decisions will shape the story.

entries.name: Jupiter-Saturn:testing conviction
entries.shortDescription: "Jupiter-Saturn:testing conviction" is a space-themed Visual Novel, with choices that affect the plot.The story follows a scientist and his struggle against the enemies he encounters along the way

entries.name: Betrayal at Paragon
entries.shortDescription: BaP is an action RPG set in a vast immersive world with day night and weather cycles. Take on a variety of side quests, discover 300+ items with magical and physical attributes, master 30+ unique skills. Defeat monsters, give flowers to girls, and uncover all the secrets of the island.

entries.name: C.L.A.S.H: Colonial Life Advancing Self-sustained Hemisphere - Chapter 1
entries.shortDescription: C.L.A.S.H: Colonial Life Advancing Self-sustained Hemisphere - Chapter 1 is an action/adventure title with platformer elements. Parkour your way through 25 unique buildings to collect hidden individual objectives/powerups. While you're at it, avoid toxic blobs that will radiate you into nothingness.

entries.name: Agricola - The King's Farmer
entries.shortDescription: Agricola - The King's Farmer: A classic, challenging economic simulation game. Manage your own farm - cultivate your fields, raise cows, train horses, and manage your forest. The goal of the game is to become king. Will you succeed?

entries.name: Rogue Whiskers
entries.shortDescription: 1–4 player cat roguelite. Scratch, pounce, and blast through 10 snack-filled floors with fish-based weapons, cat toys, and other buffing items as you fight for treats and glory.

entries.name: Erratum
entries.shortDescription: Erratum is a solo offline puzzle game where you play as Tilde, a young curious girl who finds herself trapped into an ominous tome's grasps. Solve turn-based dungeon-like puzzles and cast light magic to help Tilde escape danger and uncover the secrets held within the pages.

entries.name: Get That Box, Girl!
entries.shortDescription: You're just a girl trying to do her job: collecting boxes, solving puzzles, and doing whatever it takes to meet your quota!

entries.name: Problematic
entries.shortDescription: Problematic is a gothic party game where someone always goes too far. Judge cursed answers, betray your friends, and battle in Problematic Chess, where strategy meets chaos. Use power-ups, survive secret rules, and do whatever it takes to win. You will need every advantage you can get.

entries.name: Bedrooms on the Moon
entries.shortDescription: SQUAT, relax and clench as you become the ultimate powerbottom for FURRY men. CUSTOMIZE your character and even MAKE your own levels.

entries.name: Defense of Kyrath
entries.shortDescription: Tower defense meets roguelike in a fantasy kingdom. Position 9 wardens across enchanted forests, pastoral meadows, and volcanic badlands. 30+ enemies with resistances and weaknesses. Climb the Folly — a 20-tier roguelike ascent. A realm with a wry Olde English wink. Kyrath will not fall.

entries.name: Roller Coaster Looper
entries.shortDescription: A roguelite idle-like roller coaster sim where you draft track segments, recruit riders, and combo card upgrades between rounds, then watch the thrill scores spiral gloriously out of control. Physics optional.

entries.name: PLAYBACK
entries.shortDescription: A first-person horror game where you explore an abandoned shopping street, collect 10 notes, and survive while something hunts you. Stay quiet, search carefully, and escape before it finds you.

entries.name: Mongol 2
entries.shortDescription: Call me Mongol! Some time ago, I ventured into Agrippa's perilous realm to claim the false god's life. Armed with an arsenal of weird weapons given onto me by Mithrithnogg, the prophet of worms, I uncovered a dark truth that shook the very foundation of reality!

entries.name: Kings Archer VR
entries.shortDescription: In this atmospheric world dominated by darkness and snowstorms, you stand on the walls of a massive fortress, the kingdom's last line of defense.

entries.name: Neo Capitalist - Stock Market Survival Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Trade by day. Eat, sleep, and survive by night. Lose everything with a single bad decision. Neo Capitalist is a financial survival roguelite where the richer you get, the harder the system fights back. Play in a realistic stock market simulation or in a dystopian cyber-punk world.

entries.name: Nebula Warrior
entries.shortDescription: Nebula Warrior is a fast-paced arcade space shooter, a 15–20 minute action-driven experience designed like a high-intensity road trip through space. It evolves from a classic top-down shooter into a full 3D jet-style space combat, blending nostalgia with modern intensity.

entries.name: Regret To Inform
entries.shortDescription: A game about finding reasons to say "no." Review resumes, detect inconsistencies, and deliver rejection letters.

entries.name: Duskvein Survivors - Bloodline
entries.shortDescription: Duskvein Survivors – Bloodline is a dark fantasy bullet-heaven roguelite where you fight through cursed arenas, harvest bloodline powers, and push deeper through portals into deadlier realms.

entries.name: Prison Of Sissy
entries.shortDescription: A young man enters prison after a desperate mistake — but the real transformation has already begun. An adult visual novel about identity, survival, and unexpected desire.

entries.name: Valvontaa
entries.shortDescription: Valvontaa is a sci-fi third-person action RPG set in the distant future. Interact with townsfolk and fight off hostile aliens to survive. Find unique armor and equipment to aid on your descent into the depths.

entries.name: FlowDeck
entries.shortDescription: Simplify controlling your PC with FlowDeck, trigger various actions with the push of a button.

entries.name: Prison CAT
entries.shortDescription: Prison CAT is a turn-based social deduction game! Players must use their wits, considering each ability and the feeding order, to achieve their team's goals and win the game!

entries.name: Tower Vibes
entries.shortDescription: Classic tower defense depth with an extra sound waves sync tech garnish

entries.name: Save the Red Box: Prologue
entries.shortDescription: Save the Red Box: Prologue is a minimalist precision platformer focused on pure mechanics. Navigate through lethal traps to reach the Red Portal, trigger chaos Mode, and fight your way to the Green Portal to finish the level. No distractions, just skill.

entries.name: MergePiece: Merge pixels into masterpieces
entries.shortDescription: MergePiece is a pixel-merging puzzle game themed around world-famous paintings. On the board, every color fragment originates from a real masterpiece — your mission is to merge them back into the complete artwork.

entries.name: Magic Puzzles: Twins
entries.shortDescription: Control two magical Spheres in perfect unison. Use walls and traps to outsmart their synchronous movement and solve intricate puzzles in this cozy, mystical adventure.

entries.name: Village Coop Clicker
entries.shortDescription: A cozy cooperative village-building active clicker for solo players, families and friends. Gather resources, build your settlement, defend against raiders and prepare expeditions together — without stress, automation or idle mechanics.

entries.name: STRAFEST
entries.shortDescription: STRAFEST is a third-person co-op platformer full of physics-based minigames! Join friends in dodge boulders in volcanic pits or outrun bridge-blasting cannons. Unlock colorful Skins, Trails, and Titles to customize your character. It’s all about teamwork, goofy moments, and having a blast together!

entries.name: Ratatouille Builder
entries.shortDescription: In this cooking roguelike, inspired by many deckbuilder games, set up your garden to grow fresh vegetables and serve delicious dishes every day in your restaurant! Discover new recipes, exploit synergies, and learn your customers' favorite dishes!

entries.name: LINOVICTUS
entries.shortDescription: Fight through waves of enemies across shifting arenas, buy upgrades between stages, invest in new ships, research permanent upgrades between runs, and compete on the global leaderboards in this blood-pumping twin stick shooter.

entries.name: Nybble
entries.shortDescription: Your deck is your code. Build branching, looping programs from cards to hit byte targets and outwit rival hackers. A programming-themed roguelike deckbuilder with a heat-driven mastery climb, runaway combos, and a final boss who's been watching you the whole time.

entries.name: void future prologue
entries.shortDescription: Void Future: Prologue is a standalone free experience set in the universe of Void Future. Play as a hacker in a cyberpunk world ruled by corporations and complete a single, fully designed mission. Hack systems, solve puzzles,and uncover secrets — while staying hidden from a system that never sleeps.

entries.name: Headache: Altered States
entries.shortDescription: Immerse yourself in a psychedelic adventure created with RPG Maker. The main character uses a substance “Nix” to draw inspiration for her book from surreal worlds. The line between hallucination and reality blurs, and the search for creativity turns into a struggle with addiction and inner demons.

entries.name: Moonrise
entries.shortDescription: Moonrise is a third-person 3D puzzle-adventrure, where open-path level design and visuals take centre stage, demanding a different reading of the space at every turn.

entries.name: マイ・プラネット─MOON CHILD─
entries.shortDescription: [Gameplay Mechanics]• Controls: Simple mouse-click navigation to advance the story.• Branching Narrative: Player choices directly influence the plot, leading to multiple unique endings.• Standard Features: Includes essential functions such as Skip, Auto-mode, Save/Load, and Message Backlog.

entries.name: Jaleco Sports: Goal! 2
entries.shortDescription: Welcome to the world’s most popular sport with the kind of detail and realism that only Jaleco can deliver!

entries.name: immerGallery
entries.shortDescription: Welcome to immerGallery, the ultimate VR media viewer! Immerse in your VR180, VR360 (2D & 3D), panoramas, and regular 2D & 3D photos and videos! Enjoy VR slideshows with your family and friends in Multiplayer.

entries.name: Jaleco Sports: Bases Loaded 2
entries.shortDescription: Welcome to the world’s most popular sport with the kind of detail and realism that only Jaleco can deliver!

entries.name: Breeding Estate
entries.shortDescription: Breeding Estate is a simulation game for those of you who are not popular and can't have children, where you can choose a woman who is suitable for child-bearing and have children. Beat the males around you, raise the level of your penis, and leave behind better properties (women) and offspring.

entries.name: Sweet Massage 2
entries.shortDescription: Sweet Massage 2 - A simple and beautiful puzzle game themed around a massage parlor, depicting the daily work lives of five pretty and cute massage parlor girls. It features relaxing music, and after completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

entries.name: APEX Swoop: Card Game
entries.shortDescription: Swoop is a fast-paced shedding card game. Play cards equal to or lower than the center, or pick up the pile! Take risks with mystery cards, use Jokers or 10's to swoop the board, and host multiplayer lobbies with Steam friends or challenge advanced AI. Can you empty your hand first?

entries.name: Puzzles Forest
entries.shortDescription: This game is a classic puzzle game with multiple levels and beautiful graphics. Enjoy!

entries.name: Astrelght
entries.shortDescription: Explore the mysterious ruins of Astrelght and uncover the truth behind the Cube. Complete strange tasks, meet unusual characters, investigate anomalies, and survive multiplayer challenges in a surreal world between reality and simulation.

entries.name: Office Ladies Jigsaw Puzzle
entries.shortDescription: An adult jigsaw puzzle starring 44 elegant, alluring office ladies. Solve across several difficulty levels, lean on the hint & reference tools whenever you get stuck, and unlock a full gallery — featuring a unique Animated Mode where every scene gently comes alive as you solve.

entries.name: Authorisation Engine
entries.shortDescription: Turn a payment desk into a global authorisation network in this offline incremental strategy game about capacity, compute, mandates, quantum audits, and synthetic jurisdictions.

entries.name: MIHASHIRA
entries.shortDescription: A 2D top-down arena shooter. A freely scrolling shooter. Pixel graphics reminiscent of the SNES. Easy to control with the directional pad, two shot buttons, and a bomb button. Make full use of your two shots to smash through enemies.

entries.name: Everglen
entries.shortDescription: Build your dream farm in a cozy pixel RPG. Grow crops, fish, mine, and explore a charming island full of secrets. Meet unique NPCs, craft and trade items, and uncover magical surprises at your own pace. Relax, explore, and create your story in this farming adventure.

entries.name: The Trials - Chapter Two
entries.shortDescription: A classic 90s choose your own adventure style horror visual novel. Escape the horrors hunting you, make decisions, forge your own path. An original complete story with multiple endings. Choose your own play style with a Text Adventure Mode, sound effects, and an ambient soundtrack.

entries.name: Dream Shell
entries.shortDescription: Dream Shell is a shooter puzzle RPG set in 2084. You play a seasoned dream psychologist who dives into patients’ minds via advanced brain–computer interfaces, using weapons, skills, and judgment to heal the fractured souls of a lost era.

entries.name: Vermin Protocol
entries.shortDescription: Take on pest control contracts and hunt infestations across farms. Track, eliminate, and contain the vermin before they spread.

entries.name: Echoes of the Dark Tomb
entries.shortDescription: Explore an ancient Egyptian tomb in search of hidden treasure. Solve puzzles, avoid deadly traps, and survive hostile entities guarding its secrets in this tense first-person horror exploration experience.

entries.name: Hollow Ground
entries.shortDescription: Top-down shooter inspired by 90s arcade games. You and up to three friends play as four mercenaries as they descend into the Epsilon 9 bunker. Navigate 70+ handcrafted labyrinthine levels, purchase upgrades, and destroy chaos manifest: The Machine.

entries.name: Mech Spa
entries.shortDescription: Give the best massages and treatments to the robotic residents of Renewal City while you survive weekly quotas imposed by the mob and improve your hangar in style and effectiveness.

entries.name: 100 Summer Cats
entries.shortDescription: 🐾 Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! 😻 Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. 🐈🕵️‍♂️ Can you find them all? 🕵️‍♂️🐈

entries.name: Snow Route
entries.shortDescription: Snow Route is a dynamic 3D driving game where a true winter adventure awaits! Get behind the wheel of a truck and drive along snowy roads to the finish line.

entries.name: Secret Cats - Independence Day
entries.shortDescription: Dive into the enchanting world of "Secret Cats - Independence Day" a hidden object game where your mission is to uncover every cat hidden within stunning hand-painted artwork. Let your keen eye and curiosity guide you through this captivating journey.

entries.name: Important People of History: Presidents - George Washington
entries.shortDescription: Learn all about George Washington in this visual novel biography containing rare photos from inside the Washington Monument, Washington's home at Mount Vernon, and much more. Soldier, General, Spymaster, and President - this is George Washington! Proudly made in Washington’s home state of Virginia

entries.name: Special Request: Chapter 2
entries.shortDescription: Power, pressure, and desire begin to overlap. As Laura’s role in PAM deepens, corruption and control intensify — every choice has consequences.

entries.name: LIVORA
entries.shortDescription: LIVORA is a choice-driven life simulation where money, work, relationships, health, family, weather, world events and pressure all connect. Build a life, face the consequences, recover from mistakes, chase ambition, fall in love, start again, and see how different every life can become.

entries.name: Lythium
entries.shortDescription: Take on a task force from the gravestones! Your memories may be lost but the horde still remains. Slash, shoot, punch, and unleash your inner beast on your enemies in this action packed rogue-like FPS.

entries.name: Operation Moon Walker
entries.shortDescription: This is a single-player 3D shooting action game set in a world of prosperity and chaos, starring Isaac, the commander of the United Nations special agency "Theseus."

entries.name: Ninety Nine Dungeons
entries.shortDescription: Japanese-style action RPG dungeon crawler adventure. Explore a top-down map enhanced with full verticality and multi-level dimensions. Discover rare equipment, customize your own unique build and playstyle, and conquer the ever-changing depths!

entries.name: Bepe War
entries.shortDescription: Bepe War is a chaotic war simulator with unique missions and a sandbox mode. Drive any vehicle you can imagine, enable wild mutators, and enjoy brutal ragdolls!

entries.name: Ian's Rocket
entries.shortDescription: A history-based, strategy, open-world game in which a nation's economy is built from scratch by utilizing all available resources. Create cities and wonders, hire labor, sell crafted products, and build armies. Meet historical figures who will either fight to stop your efforts or trade with you.

entries.name: Never Gives Up Her Dead
entries.shortDescription: Time is running out after a meteor strikes your interstellar starship. While the crew is under full alert, only you seem to notice the strange red portals opening up throughout the ship. Old school text-based parser: no graphics, huge worlds, no hints. Recommended for text game veterans.

entries.name: Marshmallow Story: in Marshmallow Village
entries.shortDescription: This story follows Marshmallow, the protagonist, as he sets off on his adventure to become a beautiful and wonderful marshmallow, but first to search for the missing shopkeeper of Marshmallow Village. Progress through the story with an engaging plot and science puzzles to find the shopkeeper!

entries.name: ABC Music Maker
entries.shortDescription: ABC Music Maker is a music creation studio built around ABC notation — a compact, human-readable text format for composing music. Write melodies as plain text, hear them instantly through your MIDI setup, and route live MIDI output to any software or hardware on your system.

entries.name: Overlab
entries.shortDescription: Combine atoms to create molecules and fulfill orders to survive as long as possible.

entries.name: Grandpa's Euchre
entries.shortDescription: Grandpa's Euchre - Rule #1: NO TABLE TALK!!!!!! This is the card game version of Euchre that my Grandpa taught me. I grew up in Illinois and we played this at every family gathering.

entries.name: Random Fantasy Defense
entries.shortDescription: A Tower Defense with Roguelike factor where divine blessings are unpredictable. Build your army, adapt to random fortunes, and defend Mystologia from an encroaching darkness.

entries.name: Brick Game
entries.shortDescription: A retro-inspired classic arcade brick-breaker

entries.name: Relic Restorer
entries.shortDescription: In this 2D puzzle game, you play as a cultural relic restorer tasked with mending broken cultural relics.

entries.name: 五行策(WuXing Card)
entries.shortDescription: WuXing is a strategic card game inspired by the Five Elements of Chinese philosophy. Build powerful combos by mixing hero abilities and items, chase high scores, and adapt to ever-changing battles to forge your own winning strategy

entries.name: Rootbound Enigma
entries.shortDescription: Rootbound Enigma is a first-person puzzle adventure where curiosity leads to treasure, and mistakes lead to danger. Solve puzzles, overcome traps and parkour challenges, and explore atmospheric underground ruins.

entries.name: TravelRoute Studio
entries.shortDescription: Don't leave your journey as just a GPS track. TravelRoute Studio turns GPX files into dynamic map videos for travelers. Features multiple camera modes, custom tags, and 1080p MP4 export. Create stunning route animations for YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok in minutes to share your story!

entries.name: Visionaire Studio
entries.shortDescription: Visionaire Studio is a professional game engine designed specifically for the creation of 2D and point-and-click adventure games.

entries.name: Pickel: The Mysterious Mine
entries.shortDescription: A mysterious earthquake strikes, and the townspeople vanish without a trace. Become 'Pico' and venture deep into a dark underworld. Discover strange clues with every strike of your pickaxe. As you descend, a buried truth surfaces. What awaits at the bottom of the mine?

entries.name: Bounce Ball Clicker
entries.shortDescription: Bounce Ball Clicker is a stage-based clicker & puzzle game where you place various items on a 7x7 grid and bounce balls to collect a target number of coins. Build the optimal route while considering item synergies, and earn the target amount with maximum speed and efficiency!

entries.name: City Cardz
entries.shortDescription: Collect 1200+ city cards from 600+ different cities, build your deck and compete in strategic card battles inspired by cities from around the world. Discover unique card abilities, different combinations, and interesting city facts as you outsmart the opponents.

entries.name: Wizard Gold
entries.shortDescription: An incremental game about an ancient stone that turns wood into gold. You collect fallen wood and feed it to the stone for gold, then hire wizards, buy upgrades, and cast spells. Prestige to start once again with permanent power to help you feed the stone even more.

entries.name: The King's Game: Through the Veil
entries.shortDescription: The King's Game is a 3D chess game where the pieces are concealed from your opponent. with two game modes; standard two-player chess and a circular board three-player chess variant. All across multiple atmospheric 3D environments.

entries.name: Pictures at an Exhibition
entries.shortDescription: Aozora Haru, a troubled, recently orphaned art student, finds it hard to attach much meaning to many of the things in his life. Through the meaningful bonds he has created with the people close to him, however, he begins to understand that life is much more important than it initially seems.

entries.name: Nin Ninja RESCUE MISSION
entries.shortDescription: Nin Ninja Rescue Mission is an action, adventure, platform, and endless runner game. Run, face dangerous enemies, dodge traps, defeat enemies, and use your skills to complete a rescue mission.

entries.name: Yips!
entries.shortDescription: Throw the ball, chase it, and climb higher. Yips! is a pixel-art precision platformer where you must overcome unpredictable innings using a single baseball and carefully aimed throws.

entries.name: Cig Walk
entries.shortDescription: A place where civilization burned out long ago, but the snow still falls, and the wind still howls between dead apartment blocks. There are no missions. No miracles. Just the cold, the silence, and the soft glow of a cigarette. Relax in this doomer walking simulator and smoke them if you got them.

entries.name: FishPond
entries.shortDescription: Build a living pond where every fish has a unique genetic code. Breed for rare traits, balance oxygen and hunger, unlock new species, and watch your ecosystem compose its own soundtrack in real time. Part sim, part idle game, part science experiment gone beautifully wrong.

entries.name: Nyctophobia
entries.shortDescription: Nyctophobia is a first person horror game where you play as a new motel worker who is afraid of the dark. As soon as you step into a dark area you start hallucinating scary faces, your goal is to survive your shift.

entries.name: Master Fall
entries.shortDescription: Master Fall is a 2D psychological horror puzzle-platformer where players rotate the world to manipulate gravity, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden secrets as reality slowly collapses into a surreal nightmare.

entries.name: Twelve Boxes
entries.shortDescription: You're just a mover doing a simple job: pick up boxes and carry them to the truck. Easy, right? Not quite. Strange anomalies hide inside the house, and spotting them is the only way to avoid an endless shift of hauling boxes forever.

entries.name: Incarnation - Lifetimes
entries.shortDescription: After years of development, many failures and redesigns, Incarnation - Lifetimes final form is taking shape.

entries.name: Cage Bar: The Hunting Game
entries.shortDescription: During their vacation, Vylan and Ivy accidentally entered the Cage Bar and found that their sister Lillian had been transformed into a "human pig". They were dragged into the "Colorful Maze Death Hunting Ground". Vylan has to lead everyone to escape and take revenge within seven days.

entries.name: Mandala
entries.shortDescription: A music-driven wave shooter built on one rule: stop to shoot, move to dodge. Fractal worlds react to the music in real time. Load your own tracks and shape your own experience.

entries.name: YEET! The Elite
entries.shortDescription: Play as Earth itself in this chaotic arcade action game where you grab elite figures and YEET them into the Sun while dodging UFOs and surviving frantic planetary swats from the Moon, Venus, and Mercury.

entries.name: Truck Maxxing
entries.shortDescription: Plow, Shoot, or throw saw blades at swarms of enemies in this truck based Roguelite action game! Tons of upgrade options per run with each run being unique and challenging. Earn scrap after each run to purchase cosmetics and customize your truck!

entries.name: Pogo Panic
entries.shortDescription: Pogo Panic is a punishing parkour climb where you can play solo or co-op. Bounce on a pogo stick, burst a fleeting jetpack, and fight gravity through vertical sky courses with optional checkpoints. Turn them off for a full no mercy run.

entries.name: Another Slop Game
entries.shortDescription: Another Slop Game is a chaotic medieval co-op platformer where you and your friends jump, fall, scream, and suffer through floating ruins, giant traps, stupid obstacles, and terrible decisions. Play solo or online with friends. Reaching the top is optional, losing your mind is guaranteed.

entries.name: Solar Defiance
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced arcade space shooter where every wave pushes you harder. Collect coins, buy upgrades, and build your ship into an unstoppable force — or die trying.

entries.name: Gorotsuki Paradise
entries.shortDescription: Gorotsuki Paradise is an online PvP card game where you build your deck as you battle.🃏 Recruit over 150 unique "gorotsuki" cards and fight your way to the top of the mad city of Saitama.🦹 It’s completely free to play, with no pay-to-win mechanics!🤑

entries.name: INFLATION Inc.
entries.shortDescription: You're a lewd scientist from INFLATION Inc.; a research corporation tasked by the government to experiment on women in the name of science! Their goal is to unlock the secrets of FEMALE GROWTH and you must help them achieve this goal!

entries.name: Audictrl
entries.shortDescription: Running in your system tray, Audictrl is a desktop audio assistant that automatically changes your background soundtrack based on active windows, local weather, and the current time. From white noise lovers to podcast listeners: set your rules and let Audictrl handle the rest.

entries.name: Iron Circus × INDIEPOCALYPSE Game Jam
entries.shortDescription: Six weird games from six killer team-ups between indie game devs and indie comics artists! We've got puzzles, adventures, exploration, and baby werewolves in this collab between Iron Circus Comics x INDIEPOCALYPSE!

entries.name: Canyon Raid
entries.shortDescription: Canyon Raid is a classic reimagined in 3D. Pilot unique aircraft through procedurally generated canyons, destroy enemies, collect XP, and unlock powerful upgrades in this roguelike aerial shooter. Classic gameplay, modern twist.

entries.name: Simulation 9
entries.shortDescription: You wake up in an endless hallway with no memory of anything. A voice calls out to you and explains that after your death, your mind was placed into a computer simulation. Unfortunately, bugs are starting to appear, and you’ll have to report them to fix the simulation.

entries.name: Injury Time Lovers
entries.shortDescription: Marenza is a tiny nation that somehow reached the World Cup. Coach Ronan Cosgrove has six weeks to prove it wasn't a fluke—and three women threaten to derail it: his estranged wife Lena, embedded documentarian Quinn, and crisis fixer Renata. Choose who you spend the night before kickoff with.

entries.name: Pattaya Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Pattaya Simulator is a massage life simulation game where players travel to the city of Pattaya to earn money and pay off their family’s debts, while bringing happiness back to the city through massage

entries.name: Evercrown
entries.shortDescription: A turn-based tactical roguelike where your heroes’ actions are decided by a slot machine. Spin, lock, and reroll abilities, read enemy intentions, build powerful synergies, and push your run into explosive late-game scaling.

entries.name: Puzzles: Space Cats
entries.shortDescription: This game is a classic puzzle game with multiple levels and beautiful graphics. Enjoy!

entries.name: Poolar Bear
entries.shortDescription: Poolar Bear is a minimalist slide-until-wall puzzle game with 100 levels. Guide a curious bear through calm pools filled with whirlpool portals, bouncing plants, gusting fans, and lurking dangers like sharks and piranhas. Simple arrow-key controls meet cozy design for a relaxing yet brain-teasing adventure.

entries.name: Stinky Cat
entries.shortDescription: Kidnapped in Cyber Space with a High-tech toilet plunger on his head, Stinky Cat needs your help! In this cozy puzzle game combining Sokoban with Bomberman, you must plan your moves to push crates, set off explosives to clear paths. Outsmart the evil Fox, and blast your way back to reality!

entries.name: Trying to Wake Up
entries.shortDescription: Trying To Wake Up is a 3D platformer focused on storytelling and atmosphere. Journey through a dreamlike world, overcome simple obstacles, and gradually uncover the mysteries behind an emotional and immersive adventure.

entries.name: Enigmo
entries.shortDescription: Award-winning physics puzzle game now in spatial format! Get your brain in gear!

entries.name: MindPrompt: Party Games with AI
entries.shortDescription: Up to 4 friends in party mode or 100+ in tournaments! Can you find common ground with the AI? Craft cunning associations for the neural network or unravel its logic in a tense co-op game.

entries.name: Flamel's Requiem
entries.shortDescription: Family, power, and survival collide in this atmospheric horror adventure. Craft, fight, and uncover the truth before your illness—and your pursuer—claims you.

entries.name: Your Price, Your Honor.
entries.shortDescription: “Your Price, Your Honor.” is a game where you control the choices of a judge who is getting close to retirement. You must manage the public’s tolerance for injustice… and your own wallet.

entries.name: Drunk Dad vs Family
entries.shortDescription: Drunk Dad vs Family is a chaotic 4v1 party game where the family tries to put a drunk dad to sleep… before he turns the house into total chaos!

entries.name: Above the Sun
entries.shortDescription: Yugemaru, a self-proclaimed gal mechanic, sets out to reach the top of the Acid Tower using the power of steam. With the eerie acid closing in, climb the randomly generated platforms — climb, climb, CLIMB! ...Wait — did I just fall? LOL.

entries.name: Gems are Mine, Slashes are Yours: Blood & Blessing
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced 2D survival action roguelike where you bleed to fight, and she complains while healing. Consume your HP to smash through endless hordes, survive extreme resource swaps with a greedy AI cleric, and work a second job hunting bounties to pay for your skills!

entries.name: Chief of the Valley
entries.shortDescription: Build a PC company from a one-person operation in the dawn of computing to an industry titan in the modern era. Manage staff, secure contracts, research technology, and ship products all while keeping yourself from financial ruin. The Valley is an unforgiving place.

entries.name: City Girl: Heartbeat Sea Breeze
entries.shortDescription: An ACG love adventure game with free exploration. Featuring 3 beach girls and 5 city girls. Rich storyline, emotional bonding, and plenty of activities (exactly the kind you're hoping for~).

entries.name: Task Dock
entries.shortDescription: A floating task manager that stays in the corner of your screen. Add, complete and track tasks while using other apps. Stay organized throughout your day.

entries.name: NotifyXR
entries.shortDescription: NotifyXR is a SteamVR overlay application designed to capture desktop notifications and display them inside your VR headset. NotifyXR aims to be simple, focused, and customizable to your preferences, with several notification modes and configuration options for maximum utility.

entries.name: Piano Trauma - Stress Deluxe
entries.shortDescription: A co-op game about driving a piano to play a concert.

entries.name: Legends of Starkadia
entries.shortDescription: Legends of Starkadia is a quirky turn-based RPG full of quick-time events and action-packed adventure! The Starkadian Empire is under attack by one of their own and it’s up to a team of unlikely heroes to assist the resistance to restore peace by defeating Niko and his legion of interstellar armies.

entries.name: Time Dilation Lab
entries.shortDescription: An easy to use, fully adjustable space lab with Einstein's special relativity equations in a three-spacecraft configuration. Play around with time dilation and relativistic Doppler effects in space at your own pace. Multiple viewpoints in 3D, real-time, with data export functionality.

entries.name: shark
entries.shortDescription: Shark is a fast-paced reflex game about racing the clock to reach the flag in randomly generated levels. Dash through obstacles, chain through arrows, and don't let "impossible" levels fool you. This is an endless game of speed. How fast can you swim?

entries.name: Labyrinth of Whiskers
entries.shortDescription: In this game maps become larger and harder to get through, there are 3 ending portions of each map which only 1 will randomly have the final cheese to leave and unlock the next level, you will collect cheese throughout the maze to purchase more mazes to conquer.

entries.name: Plantify
entries.shortDescription: Plantify is a third-person farming game which focuses on a small cat learning how to properly take care of plants.

entries.name: The Adventures Of Hooman
entries.shortDescription: A sci-fi comedy graphic novel where you play Hooman, an android too conceited to be scared and too lucky to die. Your crew is going to die but they could have avoided an untimely death if they had only listened to you. You are not the problem.

entries.name: Caterpillar King
entries.shortDescription: Protect a hungry Caterpillar and guide him home in this turn-based puzzle strategy game about friendship, responsibility, and finding a family.

entries.name: Safe Haven Repair Station
entries.shortDescription: Make a new start in a dying city. Repair arcane cyberpunk items, befriend odd and intriguing characters, and make choices to shape the world around you, all from the warmth of your workbench.

entries.name: Somnus Corporation
entries.shortDescription: A psychological anomaly detection horror game set inside a collapsing dream simulation. Report inconsistencies. Question reality. Decide what consciousness is worth.

entries.name: Sex Novel - Cheating Wife 2
entries.shortDescription: An erotic VISUAL NOVEL with stunning HD visuals and steamy ANIMATIONS. A devoted wife spirals deeper into temptation, risking her marriage for the passion she can no longer resist.

entries.name: Heatspire
entries.shortDescription: Build devastating chains in this satisfying Connect-Four roguelike. Battle drunk ogres and loud knights, stack run-defining charms, drink powerful brews, and push your luck for explosive combos.

entries.name: BleepWare Incrementals
entries.shortDescription: Five complete incremental games, plus a crossover that ties them together. Command a growing war machine, dig ever deeper for resources, survive escalating defense battles, embrace chaotic absurdity, and fish through creeping darkness in one strange collection of number-goes-up adventures.

entries.name: Paper Baseball
entries.shortDescription: Guess the secret number. Beat the AI. A classic Bulls & Cows deduction game with 3 or 4-digit modes, three difficulty levels, and a sharp AI opponent. Simple rules, deep strategy

entries.name: Goblin Solitaire
entries.shortDescription: Relax with a cozy fantasy-themed Klondike solitaire experience. Customize card designs and backgrounds, unlock achievements, track statistics, and enjoy a charming goblin-inspired world while playing the classic card game you know and love.

entries.name: Tetrogue
entries.shortDescription: Stack pieces, clear lines, slay monsters. A falling-block roguelike where every line cleared strikes your enemies. Battle through a monster-filled dungeon, collect synergistic relics and gems, and survive escalating challenges across a procedurally generated map.

entries.name: 8AM: The Subway
entries.shortDescription: "8AM: The Subway" is a suspense game set in the subway after midnight. Watch the security cameras as eerie events unfold and decide if it’s fatigue, malfunction, or something far darker until 8:00 a.m.

entries.name: Evergarden
entries.shortDescription: Evergarden is a relaxing idle incremental about turning a tiny barren patch into a lush, living island. Restore tiles with your shovel, let workers gather resources, meet pets, and watch the ecosystem quietly spread on its own.

entries.name: Mora's Cat Scratcher PLUS
entries.shortDescription: Meet Mora — a confident little black cat with a crown and a paw that won't stay still. Scratch, dig, and uncover sparkling treasures in a cozy tap-and-collect game built for relaxed play. Unlock outfits, crowns, and PLUS-exclusive content in Mora's Steam debut.

entries.name: Gyro
entries.shortDescription: Abandoned deep in space, Gyro is a small utility bot tasked to clean up what once was. Along your journey, discover an arsenal of increasing tools and challenges. Featuring the music of A Life Elided, Gyro offers up whimsical, mysterious, sci-fi-based puzzles that will keep you wanting more.

entries.name: Dark Reaper Shoots! 2
entries.shortDescription: Become a Grim Reaper seeking peace and mow down the beasts of hell! This is a casual roguelike survivor action game where you craft various weapons, grow stronger with your partner GawGaw, and fight your way through the battles.

entries.name: Little Slime and the Crown
entries.shortDescription: "Little Slime and the Crown" is an exploration and puzzle platform game. Take on the role of a soft and squishy little slime creature, harness the power of the mysterious crown, search for five scattered calendars, unlock hidden passageways, journey to the temple, and return the crown!

entries.name: Ghost Exorcist
entries.shortDescription: Purify ghosts and collect their souls. Grow stronger with every soul you gather, unlock powerful upgrades through the skill tree, and guide restless spirits to their final rest in this progression-driven action game.

entries.name: A Game About Leading A Crowds
entries.shortDescription: A Short , Simple and Satisfying Incremental Game About Leading Your Crowds to Defend the castle. Lead , Fight back , And Upgrades Yourself to Overpower.

entries.name: Hollowforge
entries.shortDescription: Hollowforge is a fast-paced stealth/action FPS where you explore a decaying mining complex overrun by monstrous experiments. Sneak, shoot, and survive using an array of weapons while conserving resources. Uncover the dark secrets of a megacorporation in this atmospheric, immersive world.

entries.name: Carrot Catcher
entries.shortDescription: Squish, dash, jump, survive, repeat. Carrot Catcher is a fast-paced arcade game where you grab floating carrots, dodge hazards, and chase high scores. Simple to play, hard to master—how long can you keep up before it all gets out of hand?

entries.name: EGO
entries.shortDescription: A Smoke based 3D Beat’em all. Fight thousands of robots at a time through open-ended levels in this Arcade style Smoking Wizard game ! Dash, Jump, Climb, ignite your smoke and obliterate every bots in your way!

entries.name: Escape from Umbra
entries.shortDescription: Immerse yourself in a survival horror escape room experience. Trapped in a mysterious world of darkness where shadows lurk, your only help is a secret book and a flashlight. Solve the enigmas and move unseen to escape Umbra’s domain.

entries.name: Be Missed and Remembered: The Letter from Mayoiga
entries.shortDescription: Set in 1972 (Showa 47), this story follows a high school student on his yearly summer visit to his grandparents’ rural home. Spending quiet, nostalgic days with his sister and the villagers, he begins to believe this peaceful summer might last… until an encounter in the mountains changes everything.

entries.name: Jigokuraku: BATTLE IN HELL'S PARADISE
entries.shortDescription: The first game adaptation of the TV anime Hell's Paradise, now streaming with Season 2. "Jigokuraku: BATTLE IN HELL'S PARADISE" is now available.

entries.name: Project Trash
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced arcade game about sorting trash. Keep your streak alive, hit the high score, and learn to separate recyclables into the correct bins. Watch out for strange and fun items hidden in the pile!

entries.name: Hentai Age Gym
entries.shortDescription: Short : A relaxing Anime tile-matching puzzle. Match 3 identical tiles to clear the layered board, unlock stunning high-quality artwork, and enjoy a casual, brain-teasing experience with soothing soundtracks.

entries.name: Akayo Therapy
entries.shortDescription: Relaxing anime-style puzzle game set in a modern office. Solve puzzles, unlock beautiful artwork featuring charming office girls, and enjoy a cozy atmosphere with calming music.

entries.name: SideDrop
entries.shortDescription: A block breaking idle game at the side of your screen. Break through progressively harder rows of blocks as you buy upgrades and unlock special ball types.

entries.name: Escape This
entries.shortDescription: A falling block puzzle platformer game with punishing bosses. Switch between two perspectives to rise to the top and escape the evil clutches of The Entity

entries.name: Wet Dream Succubus
entries.shortDescription: A lewd match-3 puzzle game where you play as a rookie Succubus collecting wet dreams and corrupting humans through their deepest desires. Unlock seductive hand-drawn CGs as you progress.

entries.name: Evil Spirit Hunter
entries.shortDescription: A fast-paced top-down action shooter set in dark dungeons. Fight off waves of evil spirits, gain temporary power-ups for instant advantages, and struggle to survive while under siege.

entries.name: SILK 2.0
entries.shortDescription: Step into the forgotten Silk Roads of medieval Anatolia and uncover living stories through immersive exploration, atmospheric spaces, and AI-driven characters in a university-led research project reimagining ancient caravanserais.

entries.name: No Escape
entries.shortDescription: A challenging survival horror game which puts you in a situation where you have to escape at all costs and don't get caught by HIM. There are 4 modes that have different difficulties, out run HIM and find all the tools you need to escape the house. There are two different endings get them both!

entries.name: FitBlocks～Wooden block puzzle～
entries.shortDescription: FitBlocks is a relaxing wooden block puzzle game. Drag, rotate, and place every piece into the tray to complete handcrafted pixel-art shaped stages. Enjoy simple controls, cozy music, and increasingly thoughtful puzzles at your own pace.

entries.name: Waifu Discovered 3: Cyberpunk Fantasy
entries.shortDescription: From the creators of Waifu Discovered 2, an arcade anime shoot’em up with a unique strip’em up twist where the better you play, the more you reveal. Battle enemies, defeat absurd bosses and unlock stunning waifus piece by piece.

entries.name: HYPERFIST
entries.shortDescription: HYPERFIST is a fast-paced, comic-styled, first person melee action game focused on punching, grabbing, and other hand-to-hand combat. Play as Heath, the local punk, and use your mecha-fists to punch the robotic enemies in a fast and fluid combat system!

entries.name: SmarterWaysProductions: Andromeda
entries.shortDescription: The future is local – bring it to your PC with SmarterWaysProductions: Andromeda. Experience private AI for chat and analysis via voice today as we build toward your fully capable, helpful assistant. Your data belongs to you 100%. Scalable from laptop to high-end systems.

entries.name: Anbar
entries.shortDescription: Anbar is a fast-paced multiplayer arena game where two teams clash with opposing goals. Explorers race to build an artifact while Mercenaries use a growing ball combo to disrupt them. Victory depends on speed, timing, and teamwork.

entries.name: Fantasy World / 幻想世界
entries.shortDescription: This is a large-map construction simulation combined with a roguelike game. You will build a civilization, explore the wilderness, discover mysterious underground secrets, command large armies to fight against hordes of enemies, gather various materials and equipment, and build your own kingdom.

entries.name: Hentai Tales: 7 Days Cycle
entries.shortDescription: I keep dying and returning to the same day seven days earlier. To escape this endless loop, I must anchor my fading memories through intimate bonds with four unique women—each holding a piece of the truth behind the temporal fracture.

entries.name: Galaxy Defenders (Classic TD)
entries.shortDescription: A classic tower defense game set in space! Build and upgrade towers, defend your portal from waves of alien invaders, and outsmart evolving threats across handcrafted and procedural maps.

entries.name: TooneQuest
entries.shortDescription: An exploring and capture game. Find and capture all the unique creatures hiding on the 5 islands. Discover Abilities such as Jump, Crawl, Glide and Double-jump to help you explore.

entries.name: Forever Virgin Simulator
entries.shortDescription: A hardcore visual novel about how hard it is to be a virgin in the modern world.

entries.name: Abyrith
entries.shortDescription: Abyrith is a traditional turn-based roguelike. Each run lets you build a unique character by combining skills and equipment while exploring and conquering dungeons.

entries.name: Brandon's Semiconductor Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Educational tool for the simulation and visualization of semiconductor devices. Users can draw circuits and devices with just a few brush strokes. This is a fully interactive, realistic simulation with many visualization options and a variety of hand-made demonstrations of semiconductor devices.

entries.name: Diagram Awesome
entries.shortDescription: Create expressive static or animated diagrams with generated visuals directly inside your nodes and connections. Ideal for game loops, workflows, story structures, learning material, and visualizing complex ideas in a more intuitive and creative way.

entries.name: Accept or Reject
entries.shortDescription: Review hundreds of funny, bizarre, and sometimes suspicious dating profiles, survive office politics, play mini-games, and build a workplace romance with your mysterious boss.

entries.name: Health Audit Simulator
entries.shortDescription: Step into the shoes of a Health Auditor. FIND, FLAG and RATE potential Risks and Hazards across 20 playable environments, between two differing difficulty variants.

entries.name: BAFF C
entries.shortDescription: Minimalist, hardcore and challenging game in the genre of avoid-em up that will test your reflexes, timing and planning! This game is hard as hell!

entries.name: Custom Pinball
entries.shortDescription: A roguelite pinball game where your bumper setup seals your fate. Rely on luck, skill, and strategy to aim for the endless horizon!

entries.name: The Living Graveyard
entries.shortDescription: Immerse yourself in the world of "The Living Graveyard" - a unique game in the style of Whac-A-Mole, where instead of moles you have to fight zombies rising from their graves!

entries.name: Almost A Ghost
entries.shortDescription: Almost a Ghost is a grid-based, Sokoban-inspired puzzle game about a spirit caught between worlds. Push boxes, master evolving mechanics, and work your way toward becoming real.

entries.name: Village Survivors
entries.shortDescription: Grab your pots and pans—defendyour home! Village Survivors is a lighthearted, comedic survivors-like game (bullet heaven). Play a villager standing up for their home, turn bowls, flower pots, and frying pans into weapons, and level up to mow down an invading army!

entries.name: ORPHEUS: TO HELL AND BACK
entries.shortDescription: Orpheus: To Hell and Back is a mesmerizing action-puzzle game that brings the timeless myth of Orpheus and Eurydice to life in the palm of your hands, 80's chibi-anime style!

entries.name: Booox
entries.shortDescription: "Booox" is a platform puzzle game where players control multiple characters simultaneously, coordinating their actions to solve challenges.

entries.name: Octal: Of Course They Are Linked
entries.shortDescription: A strategy game about correlations and bending reality for profit. You’re hired to increase a company’s sales—by any means necessary. Link variables together and transform changes in the world into revenue. More penguins? Somehow, that means higher sales. Don’t question it. Optimize it.

entries.name: Fu-Fu-Chan -way up!-
entries.shortDescription: Blow into the microphone and breathe life into your climb. As simple as a breath. As deep as the sky.

entries.name: Kvga
entries.shortDescription: "Kvga (from 'Kavga' — Turkish for Brawl)" is a fast-paced card battler with fighting game DNA. Build decks, chain Kombos, and dominate the tournament!

entries.name: Artesnaut
entries.shortDescription: A hardcore medieval fantasy idle RPG, almost entirely in text. Build characters with races, jobs, and epithets. Over 1,000 items to loot. A story 93% of players rated "great." Combat and exploration are fully auto—just check your results. Now in Chapter 5, unfolding across five major updates.

entries.name: Doomsday Tryst
entries.shortDescription: When the world goes dark, Gage Renner seals the Bastion—a luxury fallout silo for the ultra-wealthy—until an extra body turns up on no manifest. Romance one of three women in a sealed bunker where air, water, and power are rationed. An adult visual novel with three branching routes.

entries.name: PX2: The Termination
entries.shortDescription: PX2 is a wonderfully wacky platformer with exquisite music and goofy visuals to top it all off. Jump, shoot, and fall in a hole as you explore the many worlds of PX2!

entries.name: I WAS A KING
entries.shortDescription: A court-driven, text-based strategy game where your words become decrees. Two petitions per turn—type carefully, face the backlash, and remember: you WERE a King.

entries.name: Two Types Pollos
entries.shortDescription: Co-op management and survival simulator. Run your chicken shop, serve customers, and decorate while manufacturing "sugar" in the back. Fulfill orders to get the medicine that keeps you alive. Cook, manage, and survive alone or with a friend in this intense double life.

entries.name: Oleander-X
entries.shortDescription: Oleander-X is a pixel-art stealth action game about classified missions, buried evidence, and a cure that should never have existed. Infiltrate guarded facilities, gather proof, plant explosives, and escape before the truth turns against you.

entries.name: The Colors of Love - Re-Colored
entries.shortDescription: A romantic visual novel about connection, choices, and the colors of the heart. Features an animated Live2D love interest, multiple endings, English and Spanish support, Steam achievements, and hidden secrets to uncover.

entries.name: Book Organizer
entries.shortDescription: Book Organizer is a cozy 3D simulation game where you become a library volunteer to mindfully organize cluttered shelves. Without stress, it delivers a satisfying visual and auditory experience as books snap perfectly into place, offering pure relaxation and deep immersion.

entries.name: JAM Adventures
entries.shortDescription: JamAdventure is a musical odyssey where your real-life instrument is the controller. Explore 10 vibrant themed realms to discover and master unique songs, or import your own library to jam along to your favorite tracks. Tuned for 6-string guitar and 4-string bass, but supports nearly any instrument.

entries.name: Assassin and Sister
entries.shortDescription: Embark on a journey to save the world in this bullet-filled adventure, born from our desire to mix the joy of open-ended exploration with a top-down shooter's juicy game feel.

entries.name: Slime Jamboree
entries.shortDescription: Slime Jamboree is a physics-based tower defense game where you stop slimes by throwing and interacting with them using your mouse. No UI, no text, and no loading screens, just seamless gameplay, with in-world controls for audio and a relaxed, playful vibe throughout.

entries.name: Bust a Nut! A Game About Raising Cocks
entries.shortDescription: An Incremental game where you bust nuts with your own two hands or an army of cocks, beavers and asses ;)

entries.name: lovely bakery
entries.shortDescription: 《lovely bakery》 is a cozy decorating game inspired by miniature houses. Step into bakery venues of various themes, arrange all kinds of items freely, turn an empty little house into your own private world, and enjoy relaxing and pleasant leisure time.

entries.name: White Signal
entries.shortDescription: Manage a remote mountain shelter, rescue stranded survivors, and survive the brutal cold.

entries.name: Last Guest at Sunset
entries.shortDescription: Investigate a replayable Hollywood murder mystery where everyone has something to hide. Question guests, uncover contradictions, and identify the killer before they escape justice.

entries.name: AR Basketball
entries.shortDescription: AR Basketball is a long-term basketball franchise simulator where team chemistry, economics, fan growth, player personalities, and league history matter just as much as winning championships. Build your organization across 100 seasons and chase multiple paths to greatness.

entries.name: The Pawn Broker
entries.shortDescription: The Pawn Broker is an atmospheric horror economic survival game. Run a cursed pawnshop, analyze every item that comes through for signs of theft or dark curses, and make high-stakes decisions to stay profitable before your five days are up.

entries.name: Soothe
entries.shortDescription: You awaken at the bottom of a rusted pit, another forgotten machine amongst a pile of those who came before. On your right, an extendable grappling claw, and on your left, a melted screen. You are given only one goal - reach the light above.

entries.name: The Mutiny
entries.shortDescription: A third-person zombie survival RPG built by one solo developer. Scavenge a post-apocalyptic tunnel system, manage gear that breaks, hunger that bites, and a world that gets darker the longer you stay alive.

entries.name: LostEcho
entries.shortDescription: A flashlight. An abandoned hospital. Seven rooms. Remember what's normal — then spot what's changed. Chair turned? Ruler gone? Poster watching you? Close the wrong door, start over. Eight floors, thirty-four anomalies. The truth hides in the details.

entries.name: Blobbin
entries.shortDescription: Blobbin is a cozy 2D idle clicker where you poke, bounce, upgrade, and evolve adorable blobs to earn mountains of Goo. Unlock new blob types, prestige for powerful bonuses, and experiment with Blob Alchemy as your squishy little blob empire grows.

entries.name: Qwerty's Quickies
entries.shortDescription: Want to type longer and harder in the bedroom? Look no further than Qwerty's Quickies! An adult comedy typing survival game. Type to survive as security chases the streaker through aisles of a busy supermarket. See how long you last in Qwerty's Quickies. Including minigames with more coming soon.

entries.name: Haggle simulator
entries.shortDescription: A Monopoly-style board game focused on negotiation, trading, and bidding between players. Can take out loans from the bank. be careful—late payments may result in asset repossession! Trade via group chat or private messages. Cross-play with mobile players. Come and sharpen your haggling skills!

entries.name: The Dungeon Persists
entries.shortDescription: A top-down, pixel-art roguelike dungeon crawler. Pick one of 6 heroes and descend through an endless run of procedurally generated floors. Build a run from weapons, relics and gear, fight 24 enemy types and 4 bosses, and carry meta-progression forward. It was here before you. It will be here after.

entries.name: Ashen Crown
entries.shortDescription: A single-player roguelite autobattler built almost entirely with AI. Pick a fighter, climb 20 battles to a final boss, and win in the build you assemble: 12 weapons, 24 classes, 53 subspecs, 247 skills. Go deep on one path or sprawl across many and break the game open.

entries.name: Urban Rangers Arcade 2
entries.shortDescription: This Is The Conclusion To The Great "Urban Rangers Arcade" - Grab A Friend For This Co-Op Event. The Rangers, Thought They Had BoJaNgLeS Taken Down.............. But The Nightmare Had Only Began...... Bo Is Back, And Hes Calling The Rangers By Name. You Got His Attention...... Finish The Fight.
